113 // Main data vectors

117 // various counts

120 public int intNodeCount; // number of interior nodes

122 public PackDCEL packDCEL; // for possible DCEL structure
123
124 // various global pack info
125 public int hes; // curvature of ambient geometry,-1=hyp,0=eucl,1=sph
126 public boolean status; // false when pack is empty
127 public String fileName; // filename when file was read/written
128 public int euler; // Euler characteristic
129 public int genus; // genus of complex. Euler+#bdry=2-2g, g=(2-Euler-#bdy)/2
130 public int intrinsicGeom; // intrinsic geometry (due to combinatorics only)
131 public int activeNode; // currently active_node
132 public int colorIndx; // last index used for "spread" colors, see 'color_circles'.
133
134 // associated data
135 public NodeLink vlist; // pack utility vert list
136 public FaceLink flist; // pack utility face list
137 public EdgeLink elist; // pack utility edge list
138 public HalfLink hlist; // pack utility halfedge list
139 public TileLink tlist; // pack utility tile list
140 public GraphLink glist; // pack utility dual graph link
141 public PointLink zlist; // pack utility complex point list
142 public BaryLink blist; // pack utility barycentric point list
143 public VertexMap vertexMap;// optional map of (some) indices
144 public Point3D[] xyzpoint; // TODO: should be vector? pointer to associated 3D coords
145 public Vector<Double> utilDoubles; // utility vector to hold doubles (caution: indexed from 0)
146 public Vector<Integer> utilIntegers; // utility vector to hold integers
147 public Vector<Complex> utilComplexes; // utility vector to hold complex numbers
148 public Vector<BaryPtData> utilBary; // utility vector of BaryPtData, holds points and data
149
150 // combinatoric
151 public int[] bdryStarts; // indices for verts starting the bdry components (indexed from 1)

161 public String getDispOptions; // if not null, was set on readpack with 'DISP_FLAGS:'

169 public PackData(int packnum) {
170 this(null);
171 this.fileName="Empty";
172 packNum=packnum;
173 }
174
175 // Constructor
176 public PackData(CPdrawing parentScreen){
177 cpDrawing = parentScreen;
178 // Note: creating new speculative PackData sets, use 'null' CPDrawing until finished.
179 if (cpDrawing !=null)
180 packNum = cpDrawing.getPackNum();
181 else
182 packNum=CPBase.NUM_PACKS; // temporary number
183 packDCEL=new PackDCEL();
184 packDCEL.p=this;
185 xyzpoint=null;
186 packExtensions=new Vector<PackExtender>(2);
187 tileData=null;
188 this.fileName="Empty";
189 getDispOptions=null;
190 utilDoubles=null;
191 utilIntegers=null;
192 utilComplexes=null;
193 vertexMap=null;
194 colorIndx=0;
195 smoother=null;
196 }
197
202 public int attachDCEL() {
203 PackDCEL raw=CombDCEL.getRawDCEL(this);
204 raw.p=this;
205 PackDCEL pdc=CombDCEL.extractDCEL(raw,null,raw.alpha);
206 return attachDCEL(pdc);
207 }
208
223 public int attachDCEL(PackDCEL pdcel) {
224
225 packDCEL=pdcel;
226 pdcel.p=this;
227 if (pdcel.alpha==null)
228 pdcel.setAlpha(0,null,true);
229 if (pdcel.gamma==null)
230 pdcel.setGamma(0);
231
232 // set some counts
233 nodeCount=pdcel.vertCount;
234 faceCount=pdcel.faceCount;
235 euler=nodeCount-(pdcel.edgeCount/2)+faceCount;
236 genus=(2-euler-pdcel.idealFaceCount)/2;
237 intrinsicGeom=PackData.getIntrinsicGeom(this);
238 fileName=StringUtil.dc2name(fileName);
239 try {
240 fillcurves();
241 } catch(Exception ex) {}
242 return pdcel.vertCount;
243 }
244
250 public int reset_pack_space(int new_size) {
251 xyzpoint=null;
252 nodeCount=0;
253 status=false;
254 fileName = "";
255 tileData=null;
256 packDCEL=new PackDCEL();
257 packDCEL.p=this;
258 packDCEL.sizeLimit=((int)((new_size-1)/1000))*1000+1000;
259 packDCEL.vertices=new Vertex[packDCEL.sizeLimit+1];
260 return 1;
261 }
262
263 /*
264 * Drawing flag scheme: flags indicate drawing instructions
265 * for objects -- circles/lines/faces. Bits set as follows:
266 * 1 - draw object?
267 * 2 - fill? (4 and 16 imply 2, also)
268 * 4 - off = foreground, on = background
269 * (applies to interior, not border, overriden by bit 16)
270 * 8 - border color? (default=foreground, else recorded color)
271 * 16 - interior color? (default set by bit 4, on -- recorded color)
272 * 32 - display label?
273
274 * Eg. flag=3: filled object, in foreground
275 * flag=9: open object, border in (recorded) color
276 * (for 'edge', this gives colored edge)
277 * flag=19: filled in color, border in foreground
278 * flag=27: filled, border and interior in color
279 * flag=15: filled with background, border in color
280 * flag=32: label only (face or circle)
281
282 * Normally, flag for each type of object; often passed on to
283 * subroutine, so may need color code with it:
284 * Eg. (cflag, ccol, ecol) for circle flag, int color, border color.
285 */
286
293 public void chooseAlpha(){
294 packDCEL.setAlpha(0,null,true);
295 return;
296 }
297
303 public void chooseGamma() { // avoid alpha
304 packDCEL.setGamma(0);
305 return;
306 }
307
314 public int setAlpha(int v) {
315 if (!status)
316 return 0;
317 return packDCEL.setAlpha(v,null,false);
318 }
319
325 public int setGamma(int i) {
326 if (status && i>0 && i<= nodeCount && i != packDCEL.alpha.origin.vertIndx)
327 return packDCEL.setGamma(i);
328 return 0;
329 }
330
334 public void setName(String s) {
335 if (s!=null && (s=s.trim()).length()>0)
336 fileName = s;
337 else fileName="NoName";
338 if (cpDrawing!=null)
339 cpDrawing.setPackName(); // record in small canvas label
340 }
341
346 public String getName() {
347 return new String(fileName);
348 }
349
353 public int getAlpha() {
354 return packDCEL.alpha.origin.vertIndx;
355 }
356
360 public int getGamma() {
361 return packDCEL.gamma.origin.vertIndx;
362 }
363
368 public String toString() {
369 String temp = "";
370 temp += "File name: " + fileName + "\n";
371 temp += "Node count: " + nodeCount + "\n";
372 temp += "Face count: " + faceCount + "\n";
373 temp += "Number of interior nodes: " + intNodeCount + "\n";
374 temp += "Number of boundary nodes: " + (nodeCount - intNodeCount) + "\n";
375 temp += "Number of boundary components: " + getBdryCompCount() + "\n";
376 temp += "Geometry: " + intToGeometry(hes) + "\n";
377 temp += "Intrinsic geometry: " + intToGeometry(intrinsicGeom) + "\n";
378 temp += "Genus: " + genus + "\n";
379 temp += "Euler charasteric: " + euler + "\n";
380 temp += "Alpha: " + packDCEL.alpha.origin.vertIndx + "\n";
381 return temp;
382 }
383
389 public static String intToGeometry(int hes) {
390 if (hes >0 ) return "Spherical";
391 if (hes <0 ) return "Hyperbolic";
392 return "Euclidean";
393 }

471 public boolean isBdry(int v) {
472 return packDCEL.isBdry(v);
473 }
474
481 public boolean isBdryFace(int f) {
482 if (f<1 || f>faceCount)
483 return false;
484 int[] fverts=getFaceVerts(f);
485 for (int j=0;j<fverts.length;j++)
486 if (isBdry(fverts[j]))
487 return true;
488 return false;
489 }
490
497 public boolean areNghbs(int v,int w) {
498 return packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge.isNghb(w);
499 }
500
507 public boolean onSameBdryComp(int v,int w) {
508 if (!isBdry(v) || !isBdry(w))
509 return false;
510 if (v==w)
511 return true;
512 return CombDCEL.onSameBdryComp(packDCEL,v,w);
513 }
514
518 public int[] getFaceVerts(int f) {
519 return packDCEL.faces[f].getVerts();
520 }
521
522 public Complex[] getFaceCorners(int f) {
523 if (f<=0)
524 return null;
525 Complex[] corners=new Complex[3];
526 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace dface=packDCEL.faces[f];
527 HalfEdge he=dface.edge;
528 for (int j=0;j<3;j++) {
529 corners[j]=packDCEL.getVertCenter(he);
530 he=he.next;
531 }
532 return corners;
533 }
534
540 public int[] getPetals(int v) {
541
542 int[] petals;
543 ArrayList<Integer> al=new ArrayList<Integer>(0);
544 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge;
545 do {
546 al.add(he.twin.origin.vertIndx);
547 he=he.prev.twin; // cclw
548 } while (he!=packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge);
549 int n=al.size();
550 petals=new int[n];
551 for (int j=0;j<n;j++)
552 petals[j]=al.get(j);
553 return petals;
554 }
555
562 public int[] getFlower(int v) {
563 return packDCEL.vertices[v].getFlower(true);
564 }

572 public int getFirstPetal(int v) {

583 public int getLastPetal(int v) {
584 int[] flower=getFlower(v);
585 return flower[flower.length-1];
586 }
587
594 public int getPetal(int v, int j) {
595 int[] flower=getFlower(v);
596 if (j<0 || j>=flower.length)
597 throw new CombException("flower for "+v+" does not have petal index "+j);
598 return flower[j];
599 }
600
607 public int getFaceFlower(int v,int j) {
608 int[] fflower=getFaceFlower(v);
609 if (j<0 || j> fflower.length)
610 throw new CombException("face flower for "+v+
611 " doesn't have index "+j);
612 return fflower[j];
613 }
614
620 public int[] getFaceFlower(int v) {
621 int[] flower;
622 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
623 int n=vert.getNum();
624 flower=new int[n];
625 if (!vert.isBdry()) // close up
626 flower=new int[n+1];
627 int ftick=0;
628 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
629 do {
630 flower[ftick]=he.face.faceIndx;
631 ftick++;
632 he=he.prev.twin;
633 } while (ftick<n);
634 if (!vert.isBdry())
635 flower[n]=flower[0];
636 return flower;
637 }

848 public double getActualRadius(int v) {
849 double x=packDCEL.getVertRadius(packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge);
850
851 // check for hyp case
852 if (hes<0 && x> 0.0) {
853 if (x>.0001) return ((-0.5)*Math.log(1.0-x));
854 else return (x*(1.0+x*(0.5+x/3))/2);
855 }
856 return x;
857 }
858
867 public double getRadius(int v) {
868 return packDCEL.getVertRadius(packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge);
869 }
870
882 public void setRadiusActual(int v,double r) {
883 double rad=r;
884 if(hes < 0) { // hyperbolic: store as x-radii
885 if (r>8.0) // treat as horocycle, set neg eucl rad
886 rad=-.25;
887 else if(r > 0.0) {
888 if(r > 0.0001)
889 rad=1-Math.exp(-2.0*r);
890 else // for small values, use polynomial approximation
891 rad=2.0*r*(1.0 - r*(1.0-2.0*r/3.0));
892 }
893 // can be negative (useful as storage of eucl radius for horocycles)
894 }
895 setRadius(v,rad);
896 }
897
907 public void setRadius(int v,double r) {
908 if (hes>0 && r>=Math.PI)
909 r=Math.PI-OKERR;
910 packDCEL.setVertRadii(v,r);
911 return;
912 }

924// System.out.flush();
925 }

934
935/* ================== combinatoric utilies for complexes ================ */
936
945 public int nghb(int v,int w) {
946 HalfEdge vhe=packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge;
947 HalfEdge he=vhe;
948 int j=0;
949 do {
950 if (he.twin.origin.vertIndx==w)
951 return j;
952 he=he.prev.twin;
953 j++;
954 } while (he!=vhe);
955 return -1;
956 }
957
964 public EdgeSimple clwEdge(int v,int w) {
965 int u;
966 int indvw=nghb(v,w);
967 if (indvw<0 || (indvw==0 && isBdry(v)))
968 return null;
969 int[] flower=getFlower(v);
970 if (indvw==0) { // must be interior
971 u=flower[this.countFaces(v)-1];
972 return new EdgeSimple(v,u);
973 }
974 return new EdgeSimple(v,flower[indvw-1]);
975 }
976
986 public Complex[] corners_dual_face(int v) {
987 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
988 HalfEdge spoke=vert.halfedge;
989 ArrayList<Complex> zs=new ArrayList<Complex>();
990
991 // if !simple, then will be laying faces out
992 // successively
993 boolean simple=true;
994 if (vert.redFlag) {
995 HalfEdge upstream=spoke.twin.next.twin;
996 if (spoke.myRedEdge==null ||
997 spoke.myRedEdge.prevRed.myEdge!=upstream)
998 simple=false;
999 }
1000 ArrayList<combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace> faceflower=vert.getFaceFlower();
1001 Iterator<combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace> fis=faceflower.iterator();
1002
1003 // use faces as already placed
1004 if (simple) {
1005 while(fis.hasNext()) {
1006 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace face=fis.next();
1007 if (face.faceIndx>=0)
1008 zs.add(packDCEL.getFaceIncircle(face).center);
1009 }
1010
1011 // for bdry, include v itself, and bdry tangency points
1012 if (vert.bdryFlag!=0) {
1013 CircleSimple cs0=packDCEL.getVertData(vert.halfedge);
1014 CircleSimple cs1=packDCEL.getVertData(vert.halfedge.next);
1015 CircleSimple csup=packDCEL.getVertData(vert.halfedge.twin.next.twin);
1016 zs.add(0,CommonMath.genTangPoint(cs0,cs1,hes));
1017 zs.add(0,packDCEL.getVertCenter(spoke)); // include v itself
1018 zs.add(CommonMath.genTangPoint(cs0,csup,hes));
1019 }
1020 }
1021
1022 // else treat first face as in place, but
1023 else {
1024 HalfLink spokes=vert.getEdgeFlower();
1025 HalfEdge he=spokes.remove(0);
1026 TriAspect tri=new TriAspect(packDCEL,he.face);
1027 do {
1028 CircleSimple cs=tri.getFaceIncircle();
1029 zs.add(cs.center);
1030 he=he.prev.twin;
1031 tri=workshops.LayoutShop.analContinue(packDCEL,he.twin,tri,false);
1032 } while (tri!=null && he!=vert.halfedge);
1033
1034 // for bdry, include v itself, and bdry tangency points
1035 if (vert.bdryFlag!=0) {
1036 CircleSimple cs0=packDCEL.getVertData(vert.halfedge);
1037 CircleSimple cs1=packDCEL.getVertData(vert.halfedge.next);
1038 CircleSimple csup=packDCEL.getVertData(vert.halfedge.twin.next.twin);
1039 zs.add(0,CommonMath.genTangPoint(cs0,cs1,hes));
1040 zs.add(0,packDCEL.getVertCenter(spoke)); // include v itself
1041 zs.add(CommonMath.genTangPoint(cs0,csup,hes));
1042 }
1043 }
1044
1045 int n=zs.size();
1046 Complex[] pts=new Complex[n];
1047 Iterator<Complex> zis=zs.iterator();
1048 int tick=0;
1049 while (zis.hasNext())
1050 pts[tick++]=zis.next();
1051 return pts;
1052 }
1053
1061 public Complex[] vertex_hull(int v) {
1062 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
1063 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
1064 ArrayList<Complex> zs=new ArrayList<Complex>();
1065
1066 boolean simple=true;
1067 if (vert.redFlag) {
1068 HalfEdge upstream=he.twin.next.twin;
1069 if (he.myRedEdge==null ||
1070 he.myRedEdge.prevRed.myEdge!=upstream)
1071 simple=false;
1072 }
1073 HalfLink spokes=vert.getEdgeFlower();
1074 Iterator<HalfEdge> sis=spokes.iterator();
1075
1076 // use spokes as already placed
1077 if (simple) {
1078 while(sis.hasNext()) {
1079 he=sis.next();
1080 zs.add(CommonMath.genTangPoint(
1081 packDCEL.getVertData(he),
1082 packDCEL.getVertData(he.next),hes));
1083 }
1084 }
1085
1086 // else treat first face as in place, but
1087 else {
1088 he=sis.next();
1089 zs.add(CommonMath.genTangPoint(
1090 packDCEL.getVertData(he),
1091 packDCEL.getVertData(he.next),hes));
1092 TriAspect tri=new TriAspect(packDCEL,he.face);
1093 do {
1094 int j=tri.edgeIndex(he);
1095 CircleSimple c1=new CircleSimple(tri.center[j],tri.radii[j]);
1096 CircleSimple c2=new CircleSimple(tri.center[(j+2)%3],tri.radii[(j+2)%3]);
1097 zs.add(CommonMath.genTangPoint(c1,c2,hes));
1098 he=he.prev.twin;
1099 tri=workshops.LayoutShop.analContinue(packDCEL,he.twin,tri,false);
1100 } while (tri!=null && he!=vert.halfedge);
1101 }
1102
1103 // for bdry, include v itself, and bdry tangency points
1104 if (vert.bdryFlag!=0)
1105 zs.add(packDCEL.getVertCenter(vert.halfedge)); // v itself
1106 int n=zs.size();
1107 Complex[] pts=new Complex[n];
1108 Iterator<Complex> zis=zs.iterator();
1109 int tick=0;
1110 while (zis.hasNext())
1111 pts[tick++]=zis.next();
1112 return pts;
1113 }
1114
1121 public Complex[] face_hull(combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace face) {
1122 ArrayList<Complex> zs=new ArrayList<Complex>();
1123 HalfEdge he=face.edge;
1124 do {
1125 zs.add(tangencyPoint(he));
1126 he=he.next;
1127 } while (he!=face.edge);
1128
1129 // convert
1130 int n=zs.size();
1131 Complex[] pts=new Complex[n];
1132 Iterator<Complex> zis=zs.iterator();
1133 int tick=0;
1134 while (zis.hasNext())
1135 pts[tick++]=zis.next();
1136
1137 return pts;
1138 }
1139
1145 public Complex[] corners_face(int f) {
1146 ArrayList<Complex> zs=new ArrayList<Complex>();
1147 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace face=packDCEL.faces[f];
1148
1149 HalfEdge he=face.edge;
1150 do {
1151 zs.add(packDCEL.getVertCenter(he));
1152 he=he.next;
1153 } while(he!=face.edge);
1154
1155 int n=zs.size();
1156 Complex[] pts=new Complex[n];
1157 Iterator<Complex> zis=zs.iterator();
1158 int tick=0;
1159 while (zis.hasNext())
1160 pts[tick++]=zis.next();
1161 return pts;
1162 }
1163
1173 public Complex[] corners_paver(int v) {
1174 ArrayList<Complex> zs=new ArrayList<Complex>();
1175 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
1176 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
1177
1178 boolean simple=true;
1179 if (vert.redFlag) {
1180 HalfEdge upstream=he.twin.next.twin;
1181 if (he.myRedEdge==null ||
1182 he.myRedEdge.prevRed.myEdge!=upstream)
1183 simple=false;
1184 }
1185 HalfLink spokes=vert.getEdgeFlower();
1186 Iterator<HalfEdge> sis=spokes.iterator();
1187
1188 // assume faces in place
1189 if (!simple) {
1190 while(sis.hasNext())
1191 zs.add(packDCEL.getVertCenter(sis.next().next));
1192 }
1193 else {
1194 HalfEdge spoke=vert.halfedge;
1195 zs.add(packDCEL.getVertCenter(spoke.next));
1196 TriAspect tri=new TriAspect(packDCEL,spoke.face);
1197 do {
1198 int j=tri.edgeIndex(spoke);
1199 zs.add(tri.center[(j+2)%3]);
1200 spoke=spoke.prev.twin;
1201 tri=workshops.LayoutShop.analContinue(packDCEL,spoke.twin,tri,false);
1202 } while (tri!=null && spoke!=vert.halfedge);
1203 }
1204
1205 if (vert.bdryFlag!=0)
1206 zs.add(0,packDCEL.getVertCenter(vert.halfedge)); // v itself
1207 int n=zs.size();
1208 Complex[] pts=new Complex[n];
1209 Iterator<Complex> zis=zs.iterator();
1210 int tick=0;
1211 while (zis.hasNext())
1212 pts[tick++]=zis.next();
1213 return pts;
1214 }
1215
1223 public Complex[] ends_dual_edge(EdgeSimple edge) {
1224 HalfEdge hedge=packDCEL.dualEdge_to_halfedge(edge);
1225 // incircle of f
1226 CircleSimple cSf= CommonMath.tri_incircle(
1227 packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge),
1228 packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge.next),
1229 packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge.next.next),hes);
1230 // incircle of g
1231 CircleSimple cSg=null;
1232 if (hedge.myRedEdge!=null) {
1233 // set up tmp 'TriAspect' for g to compute incircle
1234 TriAspect tri_g=new TriAspect(hes);
1235 tri_g.setCircleData(0,packDCEL.getVertData(hedge.next));
1236 tri_g.setCircleData(1,packDCEL.getVertData(hedge));
1237 double rad=packDCEL.getVertRadius(hedge.twin.prev);
1238 tri_g.setRadius(rad,2);
1239 tri_g.setCircleData(2,tri_g.compOppCircle(0,false));
1240 cSg=tri_g.compIncircle();
1241 }
1242 else {
1243 cSg= CommonMath.tri_incircle(
1244 packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge.twin),
1245 packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge.twin.next),
1246 packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge.twin.next.next),hes);
1247 }
1248
1249 Complex []pts=new Complex[2];
1250 pts[0]=cSf.center;
1251 pts[1]=cSg.center;
1252 return pts;
1253 }
1254
1269 public int []flowerFan(int v,int j1,int j2) {
1270 int []fan=null;
1271 int[] flower=getFlower(v);
1272 try {
1273 int num=countFaces(v);
1274 if (isBdry(v)) { // bdry case
1275 if (j1>=j2)
1276 return null;
1277 fan=new int[j2-j1+1];
1278 for (int i=j1;i<=j2;i++)
1279 fan[i-j1]=flower[i];
1280 return fan;
1281 }
1282
1283 // interior case
1284 j1=j1%num;
1285 j2=j2%num;
1286 int tick=(j2+num-j1)%num+1;
1287 if (j1==j2) // want full flower
1288 tick=num+1;
1289 fan=new int[tick];
1290 for (int i=0;i<tick;i++)
1291 fan[i]=flower[(j1+i)%num];
1292
1293 } catch(Exception ex) {
1294 return null;
1295 }
1296
1297 return fan;
1298 }
1299
1306 public int face_index(int f,int v) {
1307 return packDCEL.faces[f].getVertIndx(v);
1308 }
1309
1316 public int face_right_of_edge(int v,int w) {
1317 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v,w));
1318 if (he==null)
1319 return -1;
1320 return he.twin.face.faceIndx;
1321 }
1322
1330 public int face_opposite(int f,int v) {
1331 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace face =packDCEL.faces[f];
1332 return face.faceOpposite(v).faceIndx;
1333 }
1334
1342 public int what_face(int a,int b,int c) {
1343 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace fce=packDCEL.whatFace(a, b, c);
1344 if (fce==null)
1345 return 0;
1346 return fce.faceIndx;
1347 }
1348
1354 public int whichBdryComp(int w) {
1355 if (w<1 || w>nodeCount || !isBdry(w))
1356 return -1;
1357 int hit=-1;
1358 for (int i=1;(i<=getBdryCompCount() && hit<0);i++) {
1359 int ws=bdryStarts[i];
1360 if (ws==w)
1361 hit=i;
1362 int ww=getFirstPetal(ws);
1363 while (ww!=ws && hit<0) {
1364 if (ww==w)
1365 hit=i;
1366 ww=getFirstPetal(ww);
1367 }
1368 }
1369 return hit;
1370 }
1371
1386 public int face_nghb(int f2,int f1) {
1387 int nj,mj,v1,v2;
1388
1389 if (f2<1 || f2 > faceCount || f1<1 || f1 > faceCount || f2==f1)
1390 return -1;
1391 int[] fverts1=getFaceVerts(f1);
1392 for (nj=0;nj<=2;nj++) {
1393 v1=fverts1[nj];
1394 v2=fverts1[(nj+1)%3];
1395 int[] fverts2=getFaceVerts(f2);
1396 for (mj=0;mj<=2;mj++)
1397 if ( (v1==fverts2[mj]) &&
1398 (v2==fverts2[(mj+2)%3]) )
1399 return nj;
1400 }
1401 return -1;
1402 }
1403
1409 public int check_face(int f,int v,int w) {
1410 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(v,w);
1411 if (he==null || he.face.faceIndx!=f)
1412 return -1;
1413
1414 int[] edges=getFaceVerts(f);
1415 for (int j=0;j<edges.length;j++) {
1416 if (edges[j]==v)
1417 return j;
1418 }
1419 return -1;
1420 }
1421
1431 public int getOppVert(int v,int w) {
1432 if (v<1 || v>nodeCount || w<1 || w>nodeCount)
1433 return 0;
1434 HalfEdge vw=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(v,w);
1435 HalfEdge desig=vw.next;
1436 if (vw==null || packDCEL.isBdryEdge(desig))
1437 return 0;
1438 return desig.twin.next.twin.origin.vertIndx;
1439 }
1440
1449 public int[] left_face(int v,int w) {
1450 EdgeSimple edge=new EdgeSimple(v,w);
1451 return left_face(edge);
1452 }
1453
1461 public int []left_face(EdgeSimple edge) {
1462 int []ans=new int[2];
1463 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(edge);
1464 if (he==null || he.face==null || he.face.faceIndx<0) {
1465 ans[0]=0;
1466 return ans;
1467 }
1468 ans[0]=he.face.faceIndx;
1469 ans[1]=he.next.next.origin.vertIndx;
1470 return ans;
1471 }
1472
1481 public Complex tangencyPoint(HalfEdge edge) {
1482 if (edge==null)
1483 return null;
1484 Complex z1 = packDCEL.getVertCenter(edge);
1485 double r1 = packDCEL.getVertRadius(edge);
1486 Complex z2 = packDCEL.getVertCenter(edge.next);
1487 double r2 = packDCEL.getVertRadius(edge.next);
1488 Complex ctr = null;
1489 if (hes < 0)
1490 ctr = HyperbolicMath.hyp_tangency(z1,z2,r1,r2);
1491 else if (hes > 0)
1492 ctr = SphericalMath.sph_tangency(z1,z2,r1,r2);
1493 else
1494 ctr = EuclMath.eucl_tangency(z1,z2,r1,r2);
1495 return ctr;
1496 }
1497
1505 public int hex_proj(int v,int w) {
1506
1507 if (v==w || (isBdry(v) && countFaces(v)!=3)
1508 || (!isBdry(v) && countFaces(v)!=6))
1509 return 0;
1510 if (isBdry(v)) {
1511 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.vertices[v].halfedge;
1512 int u=he.twin.next.twin.origin.vertIndx;
1513 if (he.twin.origin.vertIndx==w)
1514 return u;
1515 if (u==w)
1516 return he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
1517 return 0;
1518 }
1519
1520 // else interior hes
1521 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v,w));
1522 he=he.prev.twin; // rotate cclw 3
1523 he=he.prev.twin;
1524 he=he.prev.twin;
1525 return he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
1526 }
1527
1538 public int axis_proj(int v,int w) {
1539 if (v==w || (isBdry(v) && !isBdry(w))) // ?? don't understand this
1540 return 0;
1541
1542 HalfEdge spoke=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v,w));
1543 if (spoke==null)
1544 return 0;
1545 HalfEdge oppspoke=Vertex.oppSpoke(spoke,false);
1546 return oppspoke.twin.origin.vertIndx;
1547 }
1548
1557 public EdgeSimple getCommonEdge(int v, int w) {
1558 HalfEdge he=RawManip.getCommonEdge(packDCEL, v, w);
1559 return HalfEdge.getEdgeSimple(he);
1560 }
1561
1569 public int find_common_left_nghb(int v,int w) {
1570 int i=nghb(v,w);
1571 if (i<0 || i==countFaces(v))
1572 return -1;
1573 if (i==(countFaces(v)-1) && !isBdry(v))
1574 return 0;
1575 return i+1;
1576 }
1577
1584 public boolean faces_incident(int f1,int f2) {
1585 int[] vert1=getFaceVerts(f1);
1586 int[] vert2=getFaceVerts(f2);
1587 for (int j=0;j<vert2.length;j++) {
1588 int v=vert2[j];
1589 for (int k=0;k<vert1.length;k++)
1590 if (vert1[k]==v)
1591 return true;
1592 }
1593 return false;
1594 }
1595
1601 public int bdry_comp_count(int v) {
1602 int next,count=1,maxcount;
1603
1604 if (!isBdry(v))
1605 return 0;
1606 maxcount=nodeCount-intNodeCount;
1607 next=v;
1608 while ((next=getFirstPetal(next))!=v
1609 && count<= maxcount)
1610 count++;
1611 if (count>maxcount)
1612 return 0;
1613 return count;
1614 }
1615
1622 public EdgeSimple getEdge(int v,int w) {
1623 EdgeSimple edge=new EdgeSimple(v,w);
1624 if (packDCEL.findHalfEdge(edge)!=null)
1625 return edge;
1626 return null;
1627 }
1628
1636 public int setCombinatorics() throws DCELException {
1637 // TODO: eventually, just return; but for debugging, keep this.
1638 throw new DCELException("DCEL combinatorics are required.");
1639 }
1640
1646 public boolean isSimplyConnected() {
1647 if (genus==0 && (euler==1 || euler==2))
1648 return true;
1649 else
1650 return false;
1651 }
1652
1662 public int setBdryFlags() {
1663 bdryStarts=new int[MAX_COMPONENTS];
1664 int bcount=0;
1665 int bs=0;
1666 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++)
1667 setVertUtil(i,0);
1668 boolean debug=false;
1669
1670 if (debug) { // debug=true;
1671 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
1672 int[] flower=getFlower(i);
1673 System.err.print("vert "+i+": flower: ");
1674 for (int j=0;j<=countFaces(i);j++)
1675 System.err.print(" "+flower[j]);
1676 System.err.print("\n");
1677 }
1678 }
1679
1680 // each time we encounter a new bdry vert,
1681 // process its whole component
1682 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
1683
1684 // debug
1685 if (debug)
1686 System.err.println("index i: "+i);
1687
1688 if (getVertUtil(i)==0) {
1689 if (getFirstPetal(i)==getLastPetal(i)) {
1690 bcount++;
1691 bs++; // bdryStart counter
1692 if (bs>=MAX_COMPONENTS) {
1693 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("More components ("+bs+") than allowed");
1694 return 0;
1695 }
1696 bdryStarts[bs]=i; // note: indexing starts with 1
1697 setBdryFlag(i,1);
1698 setVertUtil(i,i);
1699 int j=getFirstPetal(i);
1700 do {
1701 // TODO: I've disabled the exception because corner verts can have
1702 // just two neighbors; this may cause other problems
1703 if (getVertUtil(j)!=0 || getFirstPetal(j)==getLastPetal(j))
1704 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Caution: bdry vert "+j+" has only 2 neighbors");
1705// throw new CombException("error tracing bdry for "+i);
1706 setBdryFlag(j,1);
1707 setVertUtil(j,i);
1708 bcount++;
1709 j=getFirstPetal(j);
1710 } while (j!=i && bcount<nodeCount);
1711 if (bcount>=nodeCount)
1712 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("error tracing bdry with "+i);
1713 }
1714 else setBdryFlag(i,0);
1715 }
1716 }
1717 return bcount;
1718 }
1719
1727 public CircleSimple faceIncircle(int f) {
1728 if (f<1 || f>faceCount)
1729 return null;
1730 Complex []pts=corners_face(f);
1731 if (hes<0) { //
1732 int[] verts=packDCEL.faces[f].getVerts();
1733 CircleSimple sc1=HyperbolicMath.hyp_tang_incircle(
1734 pts[0],pts[1],pts[2],
1735 getRadius(verts[0]),
1736 getRadius(verts[1]),
1737 getRadius(verts[2]));
1738
1739 // TODO: the new method, hyp_tri_incircle is not working
1740// CircleSimple sc2=HyperbolicMath.hyp_tri_incircle(pts[0],pts[1],pts[2]);
1741// return sc2;
1742 return sc1;
1743 }
1744 else if (hes>0) { // sph
1745 return SphericalMath.sph_tri_incircle(pts[0],pts[1],pts[2]);
1746 }
1747 else
1748 return EuclMath.eucl_tri_incircle(pts[0],pts[1],pts[2]);
1749 }
1750
1757 public int set_aim_current(boolean flag) {
1758 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
1759 setAim(i,getCurv(i));
1760 if (flag && isBdry(i))
1761 setAim(i,-1.0);
1762 }
1763 return nodeCount;
1764 }
1765
1772 public int set_aim_xyz(boolean flag) {
1773 int count=0;
1774 if (xyzpoint==null)
1775 return count;
1776 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
1777 double angsum=0.0;
1778 int[] flower=getFlower(v);
1779 for (int j=0;j<countFaces(v);j++) {
1780 int n=flower[j];
1781 int m=flower[j+1];
1782 angsum +=Math.acos(EuclMath.e_cos_3D(xyzpoint[v],xyzpoint[n],xyzpoint[m]));
1783 }
1784 if (flag && isBdry(v)) {
1785 setAim(v,-1.0*angsum);
1786 }
1787 else {
1788 setAim(v,angsum);
1789 count++;
1790 }
1791 }
1792 return count;
1793 }
1794
1798 public void set_rad_default() {
1799 double rad=0.5;
1800 if (hes<0) rad=1.0-Math.exp(-1.0);
1801 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++)
1802 setRadius(i,rad);
1803 }
1804
1808 public void set_invD_default() {
1809 for (int e=1;e<=packDCEL.edgeCount;e++)
1810 packDCEL.edges[e].setInvDist(1.0);
1811 }
1812
1816 public void set_aim_default() {
1817 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
1818 if (getBdryFlag(i)==1)
1819 setAim(i,-1.0);
1820 else setAim(i,2.0*Math.PI);
1821 }
1822 }
1823
1829 public void set_aim_x_flatten(double x) {
1830 if (x<.000001 || x>1.0)
1831 throw new ParserException("set_aim -t flag: value x "+x+" should be in (0,1]");
1832 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
1833 if (!isBdry(i)) {
1834 double curv=2.0*Math.PI-getAim(i);
1835 setAim(i,getAim(i)+x*curv);
1836 }
1837 }
1838 }
1839
1845 public void set_aim_default(NodeLink vlist) {
1846 if (vlist==null || vlist.size()==0)
1847 set_aim_default();
1848 Iterator<Integer> vit=vlist.iterator();
1849 while (vit.hasNext()) {
1850 int v=vit.next();
1851 if (isBdry(v))
1852 setAim(v,-1.0);
1853 else setAim(v,2.0*Math.PI);
1854 }
1855 }
1856
1860 public void set_plotFlags() {
1861 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++)
1862 setPlotFlag(i,1);
1863 }
1864
1879 public double comp_inv_dist(int v,int w)
1880 {
1881 double erad1,erad2;
1882 Complex ectr1,ectr2;
1883 CircleSimple sc;
1884
1885 if (v<1 || w<1 || v>nodeCount || w>nodeCount)
1886 return 1.0;
1887 // note: tangency is default
1888 if (hes>0) { // spherical
1889 double []xyz_v=SphericalMath.s_pt_to_vec(getCenter(v));
1890 double []xyz_w=SphericalMath.s_pt_to_vec(getCenter(w));
1891 // formula: (cos(r_v)*cos(r_w)-cos(dist(v,w))/(sin(r_v)*sin(r_w));
1892 double I=1.0/(Math.tan(getRadius(v))*Math.tan(getRadius(w)))-
1893 (xyz_v[0]*xyz_w[0]+xyz_v[1]*xyz_w[1]+xyz_v[2]*xyz_w[2])/
1894 (Math.sin(getRadius(v))*Math.sin(getRadius(w)));
1895 return I;
1896 }
1897 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic: use euclidean data
1898 sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(v),getRadius(v));
1899 ectr1=new Complex(sc.center);
1900 erad1=sc.rad;
1901 sc =HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(w),getRadius(w));
1902 ectr2=new Complex(sc.center);
1903 erad2=sc.rad;
1904 }
1905 else
1906 {
1907 ectr1=getCenter(v);
1908 erad1=getRadius(v);
1909 ectr2=getCenter(w);
1910 erad2=getRadius(w);
1911 }
1912 return (EuclMath.inv_dist(ectr1,ectr2,Math.abs(erad1),Math.abs(erad2)));
1913 }
1914
1924 public double xyz_inv_dist(Point3D xyz,Point3D XYZ,double r,double R) {
1925 if (r<0.0 || R<0.0) return 1.0;
1926 double ab=(xyz.x-XYZ.x)*(xyz.x-XYZ.x)+(xyz.y-XYZ.y)*(xyz.y-XYZ.y)+
1927 (xyz.z-XYZ.z)*(xyz.z-XYZ.z);
1928 double rr=r*r;
1929 double RR=R*R;
1930 if (ab<rr || ab<RR) return 1.0;
1931 return ((ab-rr-RR)/(2.0*r*R));
1932 }
1933
1940 public int fillcurves() {
1941 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
1942
1943 uP.value=0.0;
1944 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
1945 double rad=getRadius(v);
1946 if (!CommonMath.get_anglesum(this,v,rad,uP))
1947 throw new DataException("failed to compute angle sum for "+v);
1948 setCurv(v,uP.value);
1949 }
1950 return 1;
1951 }
1952
1962 public boolean s_anglesum(int v,double r,UtilPacket uP) {
1963 int k,j2;
1964 double r1,r2;
1965
1966 uP.value=0.0;
1967 if (r<=0)
1968 return false;
1969 j2=getFirstPetal(v);
1970 r2=getRadius(j2);
1971 for (k=1;k<=countFaces(v);k++) {
1972 r1=r2;
1973 r2=getRadius(getPetal(v,k));
1974 uP.value += Math.acos(SphericalMath.s_comp_cos(r,r1,r2));
1975 }
1976 return true;
1977 }
1978
1986 public boolean h_anglesum_overlap(int v,double x,UtilPacket uP) {
1987 double x1;
1988 uP.value=0.0;
1989 if (x<=0) { // infinite radius at vertex of interest
1990 uP.value=x;
1991 return true;
1992 }
1993 int j2=getLastPetal(v);
1994 double x2=getRadius(j2);
1995 if (!haveInvDistances()) {
1996 for (int k=1;k<=countFaces(v);k++) {
1997 x1=x2;
1998 x2=getRadius(getPetal(v,k));
1999 uP.value += Math.acos(HyperbolicMath.h_comp_x_cos(x,x1,x2));
2000 }
2001 }
2002 else {
2003 double ivd2=getInvDist(v,getFirstPetal(v));
2004 for (int k=1;k<=countFaces(v);k++) {
2005 x1=x2;
2006 double ivd0=ivd2;
2007 int j1=j2;
2008 j2=getPetal(v,k);
2009 x2=getRadius(j2);
2010 ivd2=getInvDist(v,getPetal(v,k));
2011 double ivd=getInvDist(j1,j2);
2012 double cosang=HyperbolicMath.h_comp_cos(x, x1, x2,ivd0,ivd,ivd2);
2013 uP.value += Math.acos(cosang);
2014 }
2015 }
2016 return true;
2017 }
2018
2034 public boolean h_radcalc(int v,double r,double aim,int N,UtilPacket uP) {
2035 double bestcurv,lower=0.5,upper=0.5,upcurv,lowcurv,factor=0.5;
2036 UtilPacket curveUp=new UtilPacket();
2037
2038 if (!h_anglesum_overlap(v,r,curveUp))
2039 return false;
2040 bestcurv=lowcurv=upcurv=curveUp.value;
2041
2042 // may hit upper/lower bounds on radius change
2043 if (bestcurv>(aim+OKERR)) {
2044 lower=1.0-factor+r*factor; // interpolate
2045 if (!h_anglesum_overlap(v,lower,curveUp))
2046 return false;
2047 lowcurv=curveUp.value;
2048 if (lowcurv>aim) {
2049 uP.value=lower;
2050 return true;
2051 }
2052 }
2053 else if (bestcurv<(aim-OKERR)) {
2054 upper=r*factor;
2055 if (!h_anglesum_overlap(v,upper,curveUp))
2056 return false;
2057 upcurv=curveUp.value;
2058 if (upcurv<aim) {
2059 uP.value=upper;
2060 return true;
2061 }
2062 }
2063 else {
2064 uP.value=r;
2065 return true;
2066 }
2067
2068 for (int n=1;n<=N;n++) {
2069 if (bestcurv>(aim+OKERR)) {
2070 upper=r;
2071 upcurv=bestcurv;
2072 r -= (bestcurv-aim)*(lower-r)/(lowcurv-bestcurv);
2073 }
2074 else if (bestcurv<(aim-OKERR)) {
2075 lower=r;
2076 lowcurv=bestcurv;
2077 r += (aim-bestcurv)*(upper-r)/(upcurv-bestcurv);
2078 }
2079 else {
2080 uP.value= r;
2081 return true;
2082 }
2083 if (!h_anglesum_overlap(v,r,curveUp))
2084 return false;
2085 bestcurv=curveUp.value;
2086 }
2087 uP.value=r;
2088 return true;
2089 }
2090
2106 public boolean e_radcalc(int v,double r,double aim,int N,UtilPacket uP) {
2107 double lower=0.5;
2108 double upper=0.5;
2109 double factor=0.5;
2110 double upcurv;
2111 double lowcurv;
2112
2113 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
2114 double angsum=packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert);
2115 double bestcurv=lowcurv=upcurv=angsum;
2116 if (bestcurv>(aim+OKERR)) {
2117 upper=r/factor;
2118 angsum=packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert,upper);
2119 upcurv=angsum;
2120 if (upcurv>aim) {
2121 uP.value=upper;
2122 return true;
2123 }
2124 }
2125 else if (bestcurv<(aim-OKERR)) {
2126 lower=r*factor;
2127 angsum=packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert,lower);
2128 upcurv=angsum;
2129 if (lowcurv<aim) {
2130 uP.value=lower;
2131 return true;
2132 }
2133 }
2134 else {
2135 uP.value=r;
2136 return true;
2137 }
2138
2139 for (int n=1;n<=N;n++) {
2140 if (bestcurv>(aim+OKERR)) {
2141 lower=r;
2142 lowcurv=bestcurv;
2143 r += (aim-bestcurv)*(upper-r)/(upcurv-bestcurv);
2144 }
2145 else if (bestcurv<(aim-OKERR)) {
2146 upper=r;
2147 upcurv=bestcurv;
2148 r -= (bestcurv-aim)*(lower-r)/(lowcurv-bestcurv);
2149 }
2150 else {
2151 uP.value= r;
2152 return true;
2153 }
2154 angsum=packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert,r);
2155 bestcurv=r;
2156 }
2157 uP.value=r;
2158 return true;
2159 }
2160
2167 public int h_riffle_vert(int v) throws PackingException {
2168 return h_riffle_vert(v,getAim(v));
2169 }
2170
2178 public int h_riffle_vert(int v,double aim) throws PackingException {
2179 int n=0;
2180 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
2181
2182 double r=getRadius(v);
2183 if (!h_anglesum_overlap(v,r,uP))
2184 return 0;
2185 double curv=uP.value;
2186 double diff=curv-aim;
2187 while (n<20 && (diff>OKERR || diff<(-OKERR)) ) {
2188 if (!h_radcalc(v,r,aim,5,uP))
2189 return 0; // something went wrong
2190 r=uP.value;
2191 if (!h_anglesum_overlap(v,r,uP))
2192 return 0;
2193 curv=uP.value;
2194 diff=curv-aim;
2195 n++;
2196 }
2197 if (n>0 && r!=getRadius(v)) { // changed?
2198 setRadiusActual(v,r);
2199 setCurv(v,curv);
2200 }
2201 return 1; // seemed to go okay
2202 }
2203
2210 public int e_riffle_vert(int v) throws PackingException {
2211 return e_riffle_vert(v,getAim(v));
2212 }
2213
2221 public int e_riffle_vert(int v,double aim) throws PackingException {
2222 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
2223 int n=0;
2224 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
2225
2226 double orig_r=packDCEL.getVertRadius(vert.halfedge);
2227 double curv=packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert,orig_r);
2228 double diff=curv-aim;
2229 double r=orig_r;
2230 while (n<20 && (diff>OKERR || diff<(-OKERR)) ) {
2231 if (!e_radcalc(v,r,aim,5,uP))
2232 return 0; // something went wrong
2233 r=uP.value;
2234 curv=packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert,r);
2235 diff=curv-aim;
2236 n++;
2237 }
2238
2239 if (n>0 && r!=orig_r) { // changed?
2240 packDCEL.setVertRadii(v,r);
2241 setCurv(v,curv);
2242 }
2243 return 1; // seemed to go okay
2244 }
2245
2253 public int writeSVG(BufferedWriter file,Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
2254 int count=0;
2255 Vector<String> items=null;
2256 if (flagSegs!=null && flagSegs.size()>0)
2257 items=flagSegs.get(0);
2258
2259 // TODO: more sophistication later; for now, assume all circles
2260 boolean circles=true;
2261
2262 // 'sub_cmd should have options about color, fill, thickness
2263 String sub_cmd=null;
2264 if (items!=null && StringUtil.isFlag(items.get(0))) {
2265 sub_cmd = (String) items.remove(0);
2266 if (sub_cmd.length()<3)
2267 sub_cmd=null;
2268 else
2269 sub_cmd = sub_cmd.substring(2); // remove '-' and first char
2270 }
2271
2272 DispFlags circFlags=new DispFlags(sub_cmd);
2273 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink(this,"a");
2274 if (items!=null && circles) {
2275 vlist=new NodeLink(this,items);
2276 }
2277
2278 double minx,miny,maxx,maxy;
2279 Iterator<Integer> vlst=vlist.iterator();
2280 int v=vlst.next();
2281 Complex vz=getCenter(v);
2282 double vr=getRadius(v);
2283 minx=vz.x-vr;
2284 maxx=vz.x+vr;
2285 miny=vz.y-vr;
2286 maxy=vz.y+vr;
2287 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
2288 v=vlst.next();
2289 double r=getRadius(v);
2290 double m=getCenter(v).x-r;
2291 if (m<minx) minx=m;
2292 m +=2*r;
2293 if (m>maxx) maxx=m;
2294 m=getCenter(v).y-r;
2295 if (m<miny) miny=m;
2296 m +=2*r;
2297 if (m>maxy) maxy=m;
2298 }
2299
2300 double sz=1.1*(maxy-miny);
2301 double wdt=1.1*(maxx-minx);
2302 if (wdt>sz)
2303 sz=wdt;
2304 double thick=1;
2305 if (circFlags.thickness>0)
2306 thick=circFlags.thickness;
2307
2308 try {
2309 file.write("<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<body>\n");
2310 file.write("<svg height=\""+sz+"\" width=\""+sz+"\">\n");
2311
2312 vlst=vlist.iterator();
2313 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
2314 v=vlst.next();
2315 file.write("<circle cx=\""+(getCenter(v).x-minx+.05*sz)+"\" cy=\""+
2316 (maxy-getCenter(v).y+.05*sz)+"\" r=\""+getRadius(v)+
2317 "\" stroke=\"black\" stroke-width=\""+.5*thick+"\" fill=\"white\"/>\n");
2318 count++;
2319 }
2320 file.write("</svg>\n</body>\n</html>\n");
2321 file.close();
2322 }catch(Exception ex) {}
2323
2324 return count;
2325 }
2326
2333 public Mobius namedSidePair(String moniker) {
2334 // side pairings indicated with just one letter
2335 String label= moniker.trim();
2336 if (label.length()!=1)
2337 throw new ParserException("side-pair monikers just one character");
2338 String tmpLabel=new String(label);
2339 // Upper case (e.g. 'A') must be changed to double lower ('aa').
2340 char h=tmpLabel.charAt(0);
2341 if (h>='A' && h<='Z') {
2342 h=(char)('a'+h-'A');
2343 tmpLabel=new String(String.valueOf(h)+String.valueOf(h));
2344 }
2345
2346 if (packDCEL.pairLink==null || packDCEL.pairLink.size()<2)
2347 return null;
2348 Iterator<SideData> sides=packDCEL.pairLink.iterator();
2349 sides.next(); // first is null
2350 SideData ep=null;
2351 while (sides.hasNext()) {
2352 ep=sides.next();
2353 if (ep.label.equals(tmpLabel) && ep.mob!=null)
2354 return ep.mob;
2355 }
2356 return null;
2357 }
2358
2369 public int repack_call(int passes) {
2370 return repack_call(passes,false,true);
2371 }
2372
2385 public int repack_call(int passes, boolean oldRel, boolean useC) {
2386 int count = 0;
2387
2388 try {
2389 if (hes < 0) { // hyp
2390 HypPacker h_packer=new HypPacker(this,passes);
2391 oldRel=oldRel || h_packer.oldReliable;
2392 int ans=0;
2393 if (!oldRel) {
2394 ans=h_packer.genericRePack(passes);
2395 }
2396 else
2397 ans=h_packer.d_oldReliable(1000);
2398 if (ans>0) {
2399 h_packer.reapResults();
2400 fillcurves();
2401 return ans;
2402 }
2403 else if (ans<0)
2404 throw new PackingException("dcel hyp repack failure");
2405 }
2406 else if (hes>0) { // sph
2407 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("DCEL packing routines don't (yet) handle sph geom.");
2408 return 0;
2409 }
2410 else { // eucl
2411 EuclPacker e_packer=new EuclPacker(this,passes);
2412 oldRel=oldRel || e_packer.oldReliable;
2413 int ans=0;
2414 if (!oldRel) {
2415 ans=e_packer.genericRePack(passes);
2416 }
2417 else
2418 ans=e_packer.d_oldReliable(passes); // TODO: specify in call
2419 if (ans>0) {
2420 e_packer.reapResults();
2421 return ans;
2422 }
2423 else if (ans<0)
2424 throw new PackingException("dcel eucl repack failure");
2425 return 1;
2426 }
2427 } catch (Exception pex) {
2428 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(pex.getMessage());
2429 return -1;
2430 }
2431 return count;
2432 }
2433
2440 public int geom_to_e() {
2441 if (hes == 0)
2442 return 1; // eucl already
2443 int oldhes=hes;
2444 hes = 0; // change so new data is checked in approp geometry
2445 CircleSimple sc;
2446
2447 if (oldhes < 0) { // hyp
2448 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
2449 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(v), getRadius(v));
2450 setCenter(v,sc.center);
2451 setRadius(v,sc.rad);
2452 }
2453 }
2454 else { // sph
2455 // Note: sc.flag==-1 means disc is outside of circle
2456 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
2457 sc = SphericalMath.s_to_e_data(getCenter(v), getRadius(v));
2458 setCenter(v,sc.center);
2459 if (sc.flag==-1)
2460 sc.rad *=-1.0; // this may not signal what we want
2461 setRadius(v,sc.rad);
2462 }
2463 }
2464 return 1;
2465 }
2466
2474 public int geom_to_h() {
2475 if (hes<0)
2476 return 1; // hyp already
2477 if (hes == 0) { // eucl
2478 double mx = packDCEL.getVertCenter(packDCEL.alpha).abs()+
2479 packDCEL.getVertRadius(packDCEL.alpha);
2480 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) { // translate, set scale
2481 // factor
2482 // System.out.println("vert v"+v);
2483 // rData[v].center=rData[v].center.minus(cent);
2484 double m = getCenter(v).abs();
2485 if ((m + getRadius(v)) > mx)
2486 mx = m + getRadius(v);
2487 }
2488 if (mx > .999999999)
2489 mx *= 1.000005; // so roundoff doesn't push a circle outside
2490 // disc.
2491 else
2492 mx = 1.0;
2493 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
2494 setCenter(v,getCenter(v).divide(mx));
2495 setRadius(v,getRadius(v)/mx);
2496 CircleSimple sc = HyperbolicMath.e_to_h_data(getCenter(v),getRadius(v));
2497 setCenter(v,sc.center);
2498 setRadius(v,sc.rad);
2499 }
2500 hes=-1;
2501 return 1;
2502 }
2503 // else pass through euclidean
2504 geom_to_e();
2505 return geom_to_h();
2506 }
2507
2515 public int geom_to_s() {
2516 if (hes > 0)
2517 return 1; // sph already
2518 int oldhes=hes;
2519 hes=1;
2520 CircleSimple sc;
2521
2522 if (oldhes < 0) { // from hyp
2523 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
2524 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(v),getRadius(v));
2525 sc = SphericalMath.e_to_s_data(sc.center, sc.rad);
2526 setCenter(v,sc.center);
2527 setRadius(v,sc.rad);
2528 }
2529 }
2530 else { // from eucl
2531 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
2532 sc = SphericalMath.e_to_s_data(getCenter(v),getRadius(v));
2533 setCenter(v,new Complex(sc.center));
2534 setRadius(v,sc.rad);
2535 }
2536 }
2537 return 1;
2538 }
2539
2547 public int enfold(int v1) {
2548 if (!isBdry(v1))
2549 return 0;
2550
2551 if (getRadius(v1) <= 0) // avoid infinity hyp rad
2552 setRadius(v1, 0.1);
2553 int ans=RawManip.enfold_raw(packDCEL,v1);
2554 if (ans<=0)
2555 throw new CombException("dcel enfold failed in 'enfold'");
2556 packDCEL.fixDCEL(this);
2557 return 1;
2558 }
2559
2567 public int swap_nodes(int v, int w) {
2568 int rslt = packDCEL.swapNodes(v, w);
2569 if (rslt==0)
2570 return 0;
2571
2572 // fix up if there is TileData
2573 if (tileData != null && tileData.tileCount > 0) {
2574 for (int j = 1; j <= tileData.tileCount; j++) {
2575 Tile t = tileData.myTiles[j];
2576 if (t == null)
2577 continue;
2578 if (t.baryVert == w)
2579 t.baryVert = v;
2580 else if (t.baryVert == v)
2581 t.baryVert = w;
2582 for (int k = 0; k < t.vertCount; k++) {
2583 if (t.vert[k] == w)
2584 t.vert[k] = v;
2585 else if (t.vert[k] == v)
2586 t.vert[k] = w;
2587 }
2588 }
2589 }
2590 return rslt;
2591 }
2592
2601 public int swap_nodes(int v, int w, int keepFlags) {
2602
2603 // do the combinatorics of swap
2604 int ans = packDCEL.swapNodes(v, w);
2605 if (ans == 0)
2606 return 0;
2607
2608 // Note: color/aim/mark are automatically swapped,
2609 // so 'keepFlags' actions will actually swap them back.
2610 if ((keepFlags & 0001) == 0001) { // swap 'color'
2611 Color holdcolor = getCircleColor(v);
2612 Color col = getCircleColor(w);
2613 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(col));
2614 setCircleColor(w,ColorUtil.cloneMe(holdcolor));
2615 }
2616 if ((keepFlags & 0002) == 0002) { // swap 'mark'
2617 int holdmark = getVertMark(v);
2618 setVertMark(v,getVertMark(w));
2619 setVertMark(w,holdmark);
2620 }
2621 if ((keepFlags & 0004) == 0004) { // swap 'aim'
2622 double holdaim = getAim(v);
2623 setAim(v,getAim(w));
2624 setAim(w,holdaim);
2625 }
2626 return ans;
2627 }
2628
2636 public int face_vert_share(int f1, int f2) {
2637 int[] v1 = getFaceVerts(f1);
2638 int[] v2 = getFaceVerts(f2);
2639 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
2640 if (v1[j] == v2[0])
2641 return v2[0];
2642 if (v1[j] == v2[1])
2643 return v2[1];
2644 if (v1[j] == v2[2])
2645 return v2[2];
2646 }
2647 return -1;
2648 }
2649
2656 public double intendedEdgeLength(HalfEdge he) {
2657 if (hes>0) { // spherical: not-well defined
2658 return -1;
2659 }
2660 double rv=packDCEL.getVertRadius(he);
2661 double rw=packDCEL.getVertRadius(he.next);
2662 double t=he.getInvDist();
2663 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic
2664 return HyperbolicMath.h_ivd_length(rv,rw,t);
2665 }
2666 return EuclMath.e_ivd_length(rv,rw,t);
2667 }
2668
2676 public double intendedEdgeLength(int v,int w) {
2677 if (hes>0) { // spherical: not-well defined
2678 return -1;
2679 }
2680 double rv=getRadius(v);
2681 double rw=getRadius(w);
2682 double t=getInvDist(v,w);
2683 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic
2684 return HyperbolicMath.h_ivd_length(rv,rw,t);
2685 }
2686 return EuclMath.e_ivd_length(rv,rw,t);
2687 }
2688
2695 public double edgeLength(HalfEdge hedge) {
2696 Complex zv=packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge);
2697 Complex zw=packDCEL.getVertCenter(hedge.next);
2698 if (hes>0) { // spherical: not-well defined
2699 return SphericalMath.s_dist(zv, zw);
2700 }
2701 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic
2702 return HyperbolicMath.h_dist(zv,zw);
2703 }
2704 return zv.minus(zw).abs();
2705 }
2706
2714 public double edgeLength(int v,int w) {
2715 Complex zv=getCenter(v);
2716 Complex zw=getCenter(w);
2717 if (hes>0) { // spherical: not-well defined
2718 return SphericalMath.s_dist(zv, zw);
2719 }
2720 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic
2721 return HyperbolicMath.h_dist(zv,zw);
2722 }
2723 return zv.minus(zw).abs();
2724 }
2725
2731 public double angSumError() {
2732 fillcurves();
2733 double err=0.0;
2734 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
2735 if (getAim(v)>0.0) {
2736 double diff=Math.abs(getAim(v)-getCurv(v));
2737 err += diff*diff;
2738 }
2739 }
2740 return Math.sqrt(err);
2741 }
2742
2748 public double carrierArea() {
2749 double accum=0.0;
2750 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) {
2751 accum+=faceArea(f);
2752 }
2753 return accum;
2754 }
2755
2761 public double []packCurvError() {
2762 double []ans=new double[2];
2763 fillcurves();
2764 int count=0;
2765 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
2766 if (getAim(v)>=0.0) {
2767 count++;
2768 ans[0] += Math.abs(getAim(v)-getCurv(v));
2769 }
2770 }
2771 if (count>0)
2772 ans[1]=ans[0]/count;
2773 return ans;
2774 }
2775
2783 public double faceArea(int f) {
2784 RadIvdPacket rip=getRIpacket(f);
2785 if (hes<0) // hyperbolic
2786 return HyperbolicMath.h_area(this,f);
2787 if (hes>0) // spherical
2788 return SphericalMath.s_face_area(rip);
2789 return EuclMath.eArea(rip);
2790 }
2791
2797 public int[][] getBouquet() {
2798 int bouq[][]=new int[nodeCount+1][];
2799 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
2800 int[] flower=getFlower(v);
2801 bouq[v]=new int[flower.length];
2802 for (int j=0;j<flower.length;j++)
2803 bouq[v][j]=flower[j];
2804 }
2805 return bouq;
2806 }
2807
2819 public int right_slide(HalfLink hlink) {
2820 int count=0;
2821 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
2822 while (his.hasNext()) {
2823 HalfEdge he=his.next().twin.prev;
2824 if (RawManip.flipEdge_raw(packDCEL,he)==null) {
2825 count *=-1;
2826 break;
2827 }
2828 count++;
2829 }
2830 if (count!=0)
2831 packDCEL.fixDCEL(this);
2832 return count;
2833 }
2834
2840 public int flipList(EdgeLink fliplist) {
2841 if (fliplist==null || fliplist.size()==0) {
2842 return 0;
2843 }
2844 int count=0;
2845 PackDCEL pdc=packDCEL;
2846 Iterator<EdgeSimple> fis=fliplist.iterator();
2847 while (fis.hasNext()) {
2848 HalfEdge he=pdc.findHalfEdge(fis.next());
2849 HalfEdge newhe=RawManip.flipEdge_raw(pdc,he);
2850 if (newhe!=null)
2851 count ++;
2852 }
2853 if (count>0)
2854 pdc.fixDCEL(this);
2855 return count;
2856 }
2857
2864 public boolean clwFlipable(int v,int w) {
2865 EdgeSimple clwedge=clwEdge(v,w);
2866 if (clwedge==null)
2867 return false;
2868 return flipable(clwedge.v,clwedge.w);
2869 }
2870
2883 public boolean flipable(int v,int w) {
2884 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v, w));
2885 try {
2886 if (he==null
2887 || (isBdry(v) && (getFirstPetal(v)==w || countFaces(v)<=2))
2888 || (isBdry(w) && (getFirstPetal(w)==v || countFaces(w)<=2))
2889 || (!isBdry(v) && countFaces(v)<=3)
2890 || (!isBdry(w) && countFaces(w)<=3))
2891 throw new DataException("deg <= 3 or bdry edge");
2892 } catch(Exception dex) {
2893 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg(dex.getMessage());
2894 return false;
2895 }
2896 return true;
2897 }
2898
2911 public double rect_ratio(int ul,int ll,int lr,int ur) {
2912 if (hes!=0)
2913 throw new DataException("packing must be euclidean");
2914 // note: first corner is assumed to be upper-left, rest ctrclkwise.
2915 double leng=getCenter(lr).minus(getCenter(ll)).abs();
2916 double high=getCenter(ur).minus(getCenter(lr)).abs();
2917 double leng2=getCenter(ur).minus(getCenter(ul)).abs();
2918 double high2=getCenter(ul).minus(getCenter(ll)).abs();
2919 // check for inconsistency with rectangle
2920 if (leng<OKERR || leng2<OKERR || high<OKERR || high2<OKERR
2921 || Math.abs(leng-leng2)/leng>.05 || Math.abs(high-high2)/high>.05)
2922 throw new DataException("verts "+ul+" "+ll+" "+lr+" "+ur+" do not " +
2923 "appear to form rectangle: (aspect = "+
2924 String.format("%.6e",Math.log(leng/high))+")");
2925 return Math.log(leng/high);
2926 }
2927
2939 public int gen_mark(NodeLink seedlist, int mx, boolean mark) {
2940 int[] list;
2941
2942 for (int i = 1; i <= nodeCount; i++)
2943 setVertUtil(i,0);
2944
2945 Iterator<Integer> slist = seedlist.iterator();
2946 while (slist.hasNext()) {
2947 int v = (Integer) slist.next();
2948 setVertUtil(v,1);
2949 }
2950
2951 UtilPacket uP = new UtilPacket();
2952 if ((list = packDCEL.label_generations(mx, uP)) == null)
2953 return 0;
2954 if (mark)
2955 for (int i = 1; i <= nodeCount; i++)
2956 setVertMark(i,list[i]);
2957 return (int) uP.rtnFlag; // holds last_vert
2958 }
2959
2965 public int antipodal_vert(int v) {
2966 NodeLink vts=new NodeLink(this,v);
2967 NodeLink ans=antipodal_verts(vts,2);
2968 if (ans==null || ans.size()==0)
2969 return 0;
2970 return ans.get(1); // ans[0] is v itself
2971 }
2972
2984 public NodeLink antipodal_verts(NodeLink ants,int N) {
2985 if (N<1)
2986 throw new ParserException("improper request");
2987 NodeLink antipods=new NodeLink(this);
2988
2989 // no ants? choose 1 as default element
2990 if (ants==null || ants.size()==0) {
2991 if (N==1) {
2992 antipods.add(nodeCount);
2993 return antipods;
2994 }
2995 ants=new NodeLink(this,nodeCount);
2996 }
2997
2998 packDCEL.zeroEUtil();
2999 packDCEL.zeroVUtil();
3000
3001 // start with what we were given
3002 for (int j=0;j<ants.size();j++) {
3003 int w=ants.get(j);
3004 antipods.add(w);
3005 setVertUtil(w,1);
3006 }
3007
3008 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
3009 for (int k=ants.size();k<N;k++) {
3010 packDCEL.label_generations(-1,uP);
3011 if (uP.value==0.0) { // error: no verts of higher gen found??
3012 throw new CombException("ran out of vertices");
3013 }
3014 antipods.add(uP.rtnFlag);
3015 setVertUtil(uP.rtnFlag,1);
3016 }
3017 return antipods;
3018 }
3019
3044 public int[] label_seed_generations(int seed, int[] greens, int max,
3045 boolean far) {
3046 int count = 0;
3047 int far_vert = seed;
3048
3049 if (!status || seed < 1 || seed > nodeCount ||
3050 (greens != null && greens.length > seed && greens[seed] < 0))
3051 return null;
3052
3053 int[] final_list = new int[nodeCount + 1];
3054 VertList genlist = new VertList();
3055 for (int i = 1; i <= nodeCount; i++)
3056 setVertUtil(i,0);
3057 if (greens != null) {
3058 for (int i = 1; i <= nodeCount; i++)
3059 if (greens[i] < 0)
3060 setVertUtil(i,-1);
3061 }
3062 genlist.v = seed;
3063 final_list[seed] = 1;
3064 count++;
3065 int last_marked = seed;
3066
3067 boolean bdry_hits = false;
3068 // not looking for far_vert?
3069 if (!far)
3070 bdry_hits = true; // pretend that a bdry/green has been found
3071 boolean hits = true;
3072 int gen_count = 2;
3073 while (hits && genlist != null &&
3074 (max <= 0 || gen_count <= max || bdry_hits)) {
3075 hits = false;
3076 VertList vertlist = genlist;
3077 VertList gtrace;
3078 genlist = gtrace = new VertList();
3079 do {
3080 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[vertlist.v];
3081 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
3082 do {
3083 int w=he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
3084 if (final_list[w]==0 && getVertUtil(w)==0) {
3085 final_list[w]=gen_count;
3086 count++;
3087 if (!bdry_hits &&
3088 (isBdry(w) || getVertUtil(w)!=0)) {
3089 bdry_hits=true;
3090 far_vert=w;
3091 }
3092 gtrace=gtrace.next=new VertList();
3093 gtrace.v=w;
3094 hits=true;
3095 last_marked=w;
3096 he=he.prev.twin;
3097 }
3098 } while(he!=vert.halfedge);
3099 vertlist = vertlist.next;
3100 } while (vertlist != null);
3101 genlist = genlist.next; // first position was empty
3102 gen_count++;
3103 }
3104 if (!bdry_hits) // no bdry or green vert found, return
3105 // index of largest generation
3106 far_vert = last_marked;
3107 util_A = far_vert;
3108 util_B = count;
3109 return final_list;
3110 }
3111
3119 public int apply_Mobius(Mobius Mob,NodeLink vertlist) {
3120 return apply_Mobius(Mob,vertlist,true,true);
3121 }
3122
3138 public int apply_Mobius(Mobius Mob,NodeLink vertlist,
3139 boolean oriented,boolean sp_flag) {
3140 int count=0;
3141 CircleSimple sc=new CircleSimple(true);
3142
3143 Iterator<Integer> vis=vertlist.iterator();
3144 while (vis.hasNext()) {
3145 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[vis.next()];
3146 CircleSimple circle=getCircleSimple(vert.vertIndx);
3147 count += Mobius.mobius_of_circle(Mob,hes,circle,
3148 sc,oriented);
3149 setCircleSimple(vert.vertIndx,sc);
3150
3151 // vert also may occur in red edges
3152 if (vert.redFlag) {
3153 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
3154 // just handle red edges from this 'vert'
3155 do {
3156 if (he.myRedEdge!=null) {
3157 circle=he.myRedEdge.getCircleSimple();
3158 count += Mobius.mobius_of_circle(Mob,hes,circle,
3159 sc,oriented);
3160 he.myRedEdge.setCircleSimple(sc);
3161 }
3162 he=he.prev.twin; // cclw
3163 count++;
3164 } while (he!=vert.halfedge);
3165 }
3166 }
3167
3168 // update the side-pairing (not for spherical)
3169 if (hes<=0 && sp_flag)
3170 packDCEL.updatePairMob();
3171 return count;
3172 }
3173
3181 public int add_ideal(NodeLink vertlist) {
3182 if (vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0)
3183 return 0;
3184 int count=0;
3185 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
3186 int origCount=nodeCount;
3187 int v;
3188 while(vlist.hasNext() && isBdry((v=(Integer)vlist.next()))) {
3189 int loccount=RawManip.addIdeal_raw(packDCEL, v, v);
3190 if (loccount==0)
3191 throw new CombException("add failed");
3192 count++;
3193 } // end of while
3194
3195 if (count==0)
3196 return 0;
3197
3198 // fix combinatorics
3199 packDCEL.fixDCEL(this);
3200
3201 // if a sphere, set cent/rad of new vertices
3202 if (hes>0) {
3203 for (int j=origCount+1;j<=nodeCount;j++) {
3204 setRadius(j,Math.PI/2.0);
3205 setCenter(j,new Complex(0,Math.PI));
3206 }
3207 }
3208 xyzpoint=null;
3209 set_aim_default();
3210 return count;
3211 }
3212
3228 public int proj_max_to_s(int E,double ratio) {
3229 double lam=1.0,cabs,rad;
3230 Complex factor=new Complex(1.0);
3231 boolean debug=false;
3232
3233 geom_to_e();
3234 if (E<=0 && ratio<=0.0) {
3235 E=0;
3236 ratio=1.0;
3237 }
3238 if (E>0 && E<=nodeCount &&
3239 (cabs=getCenter(E).abs())>Mobius.MOB_TOLER) { // have vertex
3240 rad=getRadius(E);
3241 lam=1.0/Math.sqrt((cabs+rad)*(cabs-rad));
3242 factor=new Complex(0.0,(-1.0)*getCenter(E).arg()).exp().times(lam);
3243 ratio=0.0;
3244 }
3245 else if (ratio>0.0 && ratio<=1.0){ // have ratio instead
3246 lam=1.0/Math.sqrt(packDCEL.getVertRadius(packDCEL.alpha));
3247 factor=new Complex(lam,0);
3248 E=0;
3249 }
3250
3251// debugging: copy to p2 and display the packing -- should
3252// be a max packing of the disc.
3253 if (debug) { // debug=true;
3254 CommandStrParser.jexecute(this,"copy 1");
3255 CommandStrParser.jexecute(CPBase.packings[2],"disp -w -c");
3256 }
3257
3258 for (int j=1;j<=nodeCount;j++) { // scale, rotate
3259 Complex zz=getCenter(j);
3260 setCenter(j,zz.times(factor));
3261 setRadius(j,lam*getRadius(j));
3262 }
3263
3264 geom_to_s(); // project to sphere
3265 setGeometry(1);
3266 cpDrawing.setPackName();
3267
3268
3269 try {
3270 packDCEL.redChain=null;
3271 RawManip.addBary_raw(packDCEL,packDCEL.idealFaces[1].edge,false);
3272 } catch(Exception ex) {
3273 throw new CombException("'proj' dcel error");
3274 }
3275 packDCEL.fixDCEL(this);
3276
3277 setCenter(nodeCount,new Complex(0.0,Math.PI));
3278 setRadius(nodeCount,Math.asin(2.0*lam/(1.0+lam*lam)));
3279 if (ratio>0.0 && Math.abs(ratio-1.0)>Mobius.MOB_TOLER) {
3280 // adjust for specified ratio when on sphere
3281 factor=new Complex(0.0);
3282 Mobius Mob=Mobius.NS_mobius(packDCEL.getVertCenter(packDCEL.alpha),
3283 getCenter(nodeCount),MathComplex.ID,
3284 packDCEL.getVertRadius(packDCEL.alpha),
3285 getRadius(nodeCount),0.0,ratio);
3286 vlist=new NodeLink(this,"a");
3287 apply_Mobius(Mob,vlist);
3288 }
3289 return 1;
3290 }
3291
3295 public int radius_col_comp() {
3296 double b,t;
3297 int mid;
3298
3299 mid=(int)(ColorUtil.color_ramp_size/2);
3300 b=t=getRadius(1);
3301 for (int v=2;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
3302 double rad=getRadius(v);
3303 if (rad>t) t=rad;
3304 if (rad<b) b=rad;
3305 }
3306 if (b<0) b=0.0;
3307 if (t<=0 || Math.abs(t-b)/t<.005) { // problem of small variation
3308 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(mid)));
3309 return 1;
3310 }
3311 if (hes<0) {
3312 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
3313 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(1+(int)((mid-2)*(getRadius(v)-b)/(t-b)))));
3314 }
3315 }
3316 else if (hes>=0) {
3317 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
3318 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(1+(int)((mid-2)*(getRadius(v)-t)/(b-t)))));
3319 }
3320 }
3321 return 1;
3322 }
3323
3324
3332 public int compareCircles(PackData q,boolean radcomp,NodeLink nlink) {
3333 int node;
3334
3335 if (q.hes!=hes) {
3336 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("Comparison packing has different geometry");
3337 return 0;
3338 }
3339 node=(nodeCount>q.nodeCount) ? q.nodeCount : nodeCount;
3340 Iterator<Integer> vit=nlink.iterator();
3341 // collect data and syncronized index vector
3342 Vector<Double> data=new Vector<Double>(1); // for data
3343 Vector<Integer> indx=new Vector<Integer>(1); //
3344 while (vit.hasNext()) {
3345 int v=vit.next();
3346 if (v>0 && v<=node) {
3347 if (radcomp) {
3348 if (hes<0) {
3349 double rp=getRadius(v);
3350 double rq=q.getRadius(v);
3351 if (rp<=0.0) rp=1.0;
3352 if (rq<=0.0) rq=1.0;
3353 data.add(rp/rq);
3354 indx.add(v);
3355// if (rData[v].rad>0.0 && q.rData[v].rad>0.0) {
3356// data.add(Math.log(rData[v].rad)/
3357// Math.log(q.rData[v].rad));
3358// indx.add(v);
3359// }
3360 }
3361 else {
3362 data.add(getRadius(v)/q.getRadius(v));
3363 indx.add(v);
3364 }
3365 }
3366 else {
3367 data.add(getCurv(v)/q.getCurv(v));
3368 indx.add(v);
3369 }
3370 }
3371 }
3372 // TODO: color_conversion task: replace with 'Color' objects
3373 Vector<Integer> codes=ColorUtil.blue_red_ratio_ramp(data);
3374 if (codes==null || codes.size()==0 || indx.size()!=codes.size())
3375 return 0;
3376 for (int i=0;i<indx.size();i++) {
3377 int v=indx.get(i);
3378 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(codes.get(i))));
3379 }
3380 return indx.size();
3381 }
3382
3393 public int color_circles(Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
3394 // there should be a segment, and it should start with color spec
3395 Vector<String>items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3396 String str=(String)items.remove(0); // throw out, but held in 'str'
3397 NodeLink vertlist=null;
3398
3399 // "q" and "p" options
3400 if (str.startsWith("q")) { // form q {q} or q{q}: compare to q
3401 PackData qackData=null;
3402 int qnum=-1;
3403 try { // no space, then pack number?
3404 qnum=Integer.parseInt(str.substring(1));
3405 } catch (Exception ex) {
3406 try { // pack number after space/
3407 qnum=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(1)); // might be a space
3408 items.remove(0);
3409 } catch (Exception ex1) {
3410 return 0;
3411 }
3412 }
3413 if (qnum>=0 && qnum<CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
3414 qackData=PackControl.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData();
3415 else
3416 throw new ParserException("Specified pack numbe, "+qnum+", is out of range");
3417 if (hes!=qackData.hes) {
3418 throw new ParserException("set_color: rad comparison only if both hyp or both eucl.");
3419 }
3420 // check for 'angsum' key word, else default to radii
3421 boolean radcomp=true;
3422 if (items!=null && items.size()>0) {
3423 String tstr=(String)items.get(0);
3424 if (tstr.startsWith("angsum")) {
3425 radcomp=false;
3426 items.remove(0);
3427 vertlist=new NodeLink(this,items); // rest should be vertices
3428 }
3429 else vertlist=new NodeLink(this,items);
3430 }
3431 else vertlist=new NodeLink(this,"a");
3432 return compareCircles(qackData,radcomp,vertlist);
3433 }
3434 if (str.startsWith("p")) { // form p {p} or p{p}; copy from p
3435 PackData qackData=null;
3436 int pnum=-1;
3437 try { // no space, then pack number?
3438 pnum=Integer.parseInt(str.substring(2));
3439 items.remove(0);
3440 } catch (Exception ex) {
3441 try { // pack number after space/
3442 pnum=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(1)); // might be a space
3443 items.remove(1);
3444 items.remove(0);
3445 } catch (Exception ex1) {
3446 return 0;
3447 }
3448 }
3449 if (pnum>=0 && pnum<CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
3450 qackData=PackControl.cpDrawing[pnum].getPackData();
3451 else throw new ParserException("Pack number, "+pnum+", is out of range");
3452
3453 if (items!=null && items.size()>0)
3454 vertlist=new NodeLink(this,items);
3455 else vertlist=new NodeLink(this,"a");
3456
3457 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
3458 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
3459 int v=(Integer)vlist.next();
3460 if (v<=qackData.nodeCount);
3461 Color col=qackData.getCircleColor(v);
3462 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(col));
3463 }
3464 return 1;
3465 }
3466 vertlist=new NodeLink(this,items);
3467 if (str.startsWith("rad")) {
3468 return radius_col_comp();
3469 }
3470 int count=0;
3471 if (str.startsWith("s") || str.startsWith("S")) { // use 'spread' of colors
3472 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
3473 if (str.length()>1 && str.charAt(1)=='0') { // 's0' or 'S0', then count=0
3474 colorIndx=0;
3475 }
3476 Color cLr=ColorUtil.spreadColor(colorIndx++);
3477 boolean allc=false;
3478 if (str.startsWith("S")) // from spread, but all the same
3479 allc=true;
3480 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
3481 int v=vlist.next();
3482 if (allc)
3483 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(cLr));
3484 else
3485 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.spreadColor(colorIndx++));
3486 }
3487 return 1;
3488 }
3489 if (str.startsWith("d")) { // color based on degree
3490 // 6=white, 5=blue,7=red,
3491 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
3492 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
3493 int v=(int)vlist.next();
3494 int deg=countFaces(v);
3495 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.colorByDegree(deg));
3496 count++;
3497 }
3498 return count;
3499 }
3500 if (str.startsWith("a")) { // based on argument of center
3501 double theta;
3502 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
3503 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
3504 int v=(int)vlist.next();
3505 theta=getCenter(v).arg();
3506 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.ArgWheel(theta));
3507 count++;
3508 }
3509 return count;
3510 }
3511
3512 // otherwise, find 'coLor', then apply it to all listed vertices
3513 int coLor=ColorUtil.FG_COLOR;
3514 if (str.startsWith("bg")) {
3515 coLor=ColorUtil.BG_COLOR;
3516 }
3517 else if (str.startsWith("fg")) {
3518 coLor=ColorUtil.FG_COLOR;
3519 }
3520 else { // read color index
3521 try {
3522 coLor=Integer.parseInt(str);
3523 } catch(Exception ex) {
3524 throw new ParserException("Error in color code: "+str);
3525 }
3526 if (coLor<0 || coLor>255)
3527 throw new ParserException("Color code "+coLor+" out of range [0,255]");
3528 }
3529 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
3530 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
3531 int v=(Integer)vlist.next();
3532 setCircleColor(v,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(coLor)));
3533 }
3534 return 1;
3535 }
3536
3537 public int color_faces(Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
3538 Vector<String>items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3539 String str=(String)items.remove(0); // throw out, but held in 'str'
3540 FaceLink facelist=null;
3541
3542 // first, have to check for various letter codes:
3543 // qc (quasi-conformal)
3544 // area (gradation based on area)
3545 // x (compare eucl area in p to 3-space area if 'p.xyzpoints' exists
3546 // s (spread of colors for distinctness)
3547 // v (use vertex colors, majority wins)
3548
3549 char c=str.charAt(0);
3550 int count=0;
3551 switch(c){
3552 case 'a':
3553 {
3554 if (str.startsWith("area")) {
3555 return ColorCoding.face_area_comp(this);
3556 }
3557 facelist=new FaceLink(this,items);
3558 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
3559 while(flist.hasNext()) {
3560 int f=flist.next();
3561 double arg=0.0;
3562 int[] fverts=getFaceVerts(f);
3563 Complex z0=getCenter(fverts[0]);
3564 Complex z1=getCenter(fverts[1]);
3565 Complex z2=getCenter(fverts[2]);
3566 CircleSimple sc=null;
3567 if (hes<0) {
3568 sc=HyperbolicMath.hyp_tang_incircle(z0,z1,z2,
3569 getRadius(fverts[0]),getRadius(fverts[1]),
3570 getRadius(fverts[2]));
3571 arg=sc.center.arg();
3572 }
3573 else if (hes>0) {
3574 sc=SphericalMath.sph_tri_incircle(z0,z1,z2);
3575 arg = SphView.s_pt_to_visual_plane(sc.center).arg();
3576 }
3577 else {
3578 sc=EuclMath.eucl_tri_incircle(z0,z1,z2);
3579 arg=sc.center.arg();
3580 }
3581 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.ArgWheel(arg));
3582 count++;
3583 }
3584 return count;
3585 }
3586 case 'q':
3587 {
3588 // ========= qc ==============
3589 if(str.startsWith("qc")) {
3590 flagSegs.remove(0);
3591 return color_qc(flagSegs); // pass parsing to subroutine
3592 }
3593
3594 else { // form q {q}: compare area to q
3595 // TODO: currently, this applies to ALL faces
3596 PackData qackData=null;
3597 int qnum=-1;
3598 try { // no space, then pack number?
3599 qnum=Integer.parseInt(str.substring(2));
3600 items.remove(0);
3601 } catch (Exception ex) {
3602 try { // pack number? there might be a space
3603 qnum=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(0));
3604 items.remove(0);
3605 } catch (Exception ex1) {
3606 return 0;
3607 }
3608 }
3609 if (qnum>=0 && qnum<CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
3610 qackData=PackControl.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData();
3611 else throw new ParserException("Pack number, "+qnum+
3612 ", out of range");
3613 if (hes!=qackData.hes) {
3614 throw new ParserException("set_color: "+
3615 "area comparision only if both hyp "+
3616 "or both eucl.");
3617 }
3618 if (hes<0)
3619 return ColorCoding.h_compare_area(this,qackData);
3620 return ColorCoding.e_compare_area(this,qackData);
3621 }
3622 }
3623 case 'p': // form p {p}; copy from p
3624 {
3625 PackData qackData=null;
3626 int pnum=-1;
3627 try { // no space, then pack number?
3628 pnum=Integer.parseInt(str.substring(2));
3629 items.remove(0);
3630 } catch (Exception ex) {
3631 try { // pack number after space/
3632 pnum=Integer.parseInt(items.elementAt(1)); // might be a space
3633 items.remove(1);
3634 items.remove(0);
3635 } catch (Exception ex1) {
3636 return 0;
3637 }
3638 }
3639 if (pnum>=0 && pnum<CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
3640 qackData=PackControl.cpDrawing[pnum].getPackData();
3641 else throw new ParserException("Pack number, "+pnum+", out of range");
3642
3643 facelist=new FaceLink(this,items);
3644 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
3645 while(flist.hasNext()) {
3646 int f=(Integer)flist.next();
3647 if (f<=qackData.faceCount);
3648 Color col=qackData.getFaceColor(f);
3649 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(col));
3650 count++;
3651 }
3652 return count;
3653 }
3654 case 's': // use 'spread' of colors: fall through
3655 case 'S': // one color for the whole list
3656 {
3657 facelist=new FaceLink(this,items);
3658 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
3659 if (str.length()>1 && str.charAt(1)=='0') { // 's0' or 'S0', then count=0
3660 colorIndx=0;
3661 }
3662 Color cLr=ColorUtil.spreadColor(colorIndx++);
3663 boolean allc=false;
3664 if (c=='S') { // from spread, but all the same
3665 allc=true;
3666 }
3667 while(flist.hasNext()) {
3668 int f=flist.next();
3669 if (allc)
3670 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(cLr));
3671 else
3672 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.spreadColor(colorIndx++));
3673 }
3674 return 1;
3675 }
3676 case 'x': // compare eucl face areas: 3D/2D
3677 {
3678 if (hes!=0 || ColorCoding.setXYZ_areas(this)==0)
3679 return count;
3680 facelist=new FaceLink(this,items);
3681 Vector<Double>ratios=PackMethods.areaRatio(this, facelist);
3682 Vector<Color> outvec=ColorUtil.richter_red_ramp(ratios);
3683 outvec.remove(0); // first spot also unused
3684
3685 // set these face colors
3686 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
3687 while(flist.hasNext()) {
3688 int f=flist.next();
3689 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(outvec.remove(0)));
3690 count++;
3691 }
3692 return count;
3693 }
3694 } // end of switch
3695
3696 // otherwise, find 'coLor', then apply it to all listed faces
3697 int coLor=ColorUtil.FG_COLOR;
3698 if (str.startsWith("bg")) {
3699 coLor=ColorUtil.BG_COLOR;
3700 }
3701 else if (str.startsWith("fg")) {
3702 coLor=ColorUtil.FG_COLOR;
3703 }
3704 else { // read color index
3705 try {
3706 coLor=Integer.parseInt(str);
3707 } catch(Exception ex) {
3708 throw new ParserException("Error in color code: "+str);
3709 }
3710 if (coLor<0 || coLor>255)
3711 throw new ParserException("Color code "+coLor+" out of range [0,255]");
3712 }
3713 facelist=new FaceLink(this,items);
3714 Iterator<Integer> flist=facelist.iterator();
3715 while(flist.hasNext()) {
3716 int f=(Integer)flist.next();
3717 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(coLor)));
3718 count++;
3719 }
3720 return count;
3721 }
3722
3728 public int color_edges(Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
3729 Vector<String>items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3730 String str=(String)items.remove(0); // throw out, but held in 'str'
3731 HalfLink edgelist=new HalfLink(this,items);
3732
3733 // first, have to check for various letter codes:
3734 // r reset all to foreground
3735 // z (blue-red gradation based on schwarzian)
3736 // s/S (spread of colors for distinctness)
3737
3738 char c=str.charAt(0);
3739 int count=0;
3740 switch(c){
3741 case 's':
3742 case 'S': // one color for the whole list
3743 {
3744 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=edgelist.iterator();
3745 if (str.length()>1 && str.charAt(1)=='0') { // 's0' or 'S0', then count=0
3746 colorIndx=0;
3747 }
3748 Color cLr=ColorUtil.spreadColor(colorIndx++);
3749 boolean allc=false;
3750 if (c=='S') { // from spread, but all the same
3751 allc=true;
3752 }
3753 while(his.hasNext()) {
3754 HalfEdge he=his.next();
3755 if (allc)
3756 setEdgeColor(he,ColorUtil.cloneMe(cLr));
3757 else
3758 setEdgeColor(he,ColorUtil.spreadColor(colorIndx++));
3759 }
3760 return 1;
3761 }
3762 case 'r':
3763 {
3764 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=edgelist.iterator();
3765 while (his.hasNext()) {
3766 HalfEdge he=his.next();
3767 setEdgeColor(he,ColorUtil.FG_Color);
3768 count++;
3769 }
3770 return count;
3771 }
3772 case 'z': // schwarzians
3773 {
3774 // first have to set blue_red ramp entries based
3775 // on all interior edges.
3776 HalfLink hlink=new HalfLink(this,"i");
3777 ArrayList<Double> data=new ArrayList<Double>();
3778 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
3779 while (his.hasNext())
3780 data.add(his.next().getSchwarzian());
3781 ArrayList<Integer> codes=ColorUtil.blue_red_color_ramp(data);
3782
3783 // Now color edgelist
3784 his=edgelist.iterator();
3785 while(his.hasNext()) {
3786 HalfEdge he=his.next();
3787 int index=hlink.indexOf(he);
3788 if (index>=0) {
3789 int k=codes.get(index);
3790 he.setColor(ColorUtil.coLor(k));
3791 }
3792 count++;
3793 }
3794 return count;
3795 }
3796 } // end of switch
3797
3798 return count;
3799 }
3800
3809 public int color_tiles(int tmode,Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
3810 TileData myTileData=tileData;
3811 if (tileData==null || tileData.tileCount<=0)
3812 return 0;
3813 if (tmode==2) {
3814 if (tileData.dualTileData==null)
3815 return 0;
3816 myTileData=tileData.dualTileData;
3817 }
3818 else if (tmode==2) {
3819 if (tileData.quadTileData==null)
3820 return 0;
3821 myTileData=tileData.quadTileData;
3822 }
3823
3824 Vector<String>items=(Vector<String>)flagSegs.get(0);
3825 String str=(String)items.remove(0); // throw out, but held in 'str'
3826 TileLink tilelist=null;
3827
3828 // first, have to check for various letter codes:
3829 // v copy color of barycenter vertex
3830 // s (spread of colors for distinctness)
3831 // d for degree (meaning, number of tile vertices)
3832
3833 char c=str.charAt(0);
3834 int count=0;
3835 switch(c){
3836 case 'v': // baryCenter color (as vertex)
3837 {
3838 tilelist=new TileLink(myTileData,items);
3839 Iterator<Integer> tlist=tilelist.iterator();
3840 int t;
3841 while (tlist.hasNext()) {
3842 t=tlist.next();
3843 Tile tile=myTileData.myTiles[t];
3844 Color color=getCircleColor(tile.baryVert);
3845 myTileData.myTiles[t].color=ColorUtil.cloneMe(color);
3846 count++;
3847 }
3848 return count;
3849 }
3850 case 'd': // by number of corners
3851 {
3852 tilelist=new TileLink(myTileData,items);
3853 Iterator<Integer> tlist=tilelist.iterator();
3854 int t;
3855 while (tlist.hasNext()) {
3856 t=tlist.next();
3857 Tile tile=myTileData.myTiles[t];
3858 tile.color=ColorUtil.colorByDegree(tile.vertCount);
3859 count++;
3860 }
3861 return count;
3862 }
3863 case 's': // use 'spread' of colors: fall through
3864 case 'S': // one color for the whole list
3865 {
3866 tilelist=new TileLink(myTileData,items);
3867 Iterator<Integer> tlist=tilelist.iterator();
3868 int t;
3869 Color cLr=ColorUtil.getBGColor();
3870 count=(int)(Math.random()*16);
3871 if (str.length()>1 && str.charAt(1)=='0') // start at 0
3872 count=0;
3873 if (c=='S') {
3874 cLr=ColorUtil.spreadColor(count%16);
3875 }
3876 try {
3877 while(tlist.hasNext()) {
3878 t=(Integer)tlist.next();
3879 if (c=='S')
3880 myTileData.myTiles[t].color=new Color(cLr.getRed(),cLr.getGreen(),cLr.getBlue()); // all use the same color
3881 else
3882 myTileData.myTiles[t].color=ColorUtil.spreadColor(count%16);
3883 count++;
3884 }
3885 } catch (Exception ex) {}
3886 return count;
3887 }
3888 } // end of switch
3889
3890 // otherwise, find 'coLor', then apply it to all listed faces
3891 int coLor=ColorUtil.FG_COLOR;
3892 if (str.startsWith("bg")) {
3893 coLor=ColorUtil.BG_COLOR;
3894 }
3895 else if (str.startsWith("fg")) {
3896 coLor=ColorUtil.FG_COLOR;
3897 }
3898 else { // read color index
3899 try {
3900 coLor=Integer.parseInt(str);
3901 } catch(Exception ex) {
3902 throw new ParserException("Error in color code: "+str);
3903 }
3904 if (coLor<0 || coLor>255)
3905 throw new ParserException("Color code "+coLor+" out of range [0,255]");
3906 }
3907
3908 //
3909 tilelist=new TileLink(myTileData,items);
3910 Iterator<Integer> tlist=tilelist.iterator();
3911 while(tlist.hasNext()) {
3912 int t=(Integer)tlist.next();
3913 myTileData.myTiles[t].color=ColorUtil.coLor(coLor);
3914 count++;
3915 }
3916 return count;
3917 }
3918
3932 public int color_qc(Vector<Vector<String>> flagSegs) {
3933 Vector<String> items=null;
3934 String str=null;
3935 PackData qackData=null;
3936 double maxdil=2.0; // upper bound on dilatation, default 2.0.
3937 boolean compare=true;
3938
3939 // throw out any empty elements
3940 for (int j=flagSegs.size()-1;j>=0;j--) {
3941 items=flagSegs.get(j);
3942 if (items.size()==0) flagSegs.remove(j);
3943 }
3944
3945 /* First flag string must be one of these, other flags may
3946 * follow. Look for, read, and remove each flag.
3947 * -q {p} compare to pack p
3948 * -x compared to xyz-data stored for this packing
3949 * -m {m} maximal dilatation: those above are colored blue.
3950 * not yet implemented:
3951 * -n {filename} compare to xyz-data in filename
3952 * -s {filename} ditto, but data in script file
3953 * Set compare=true (compare to q); false, use xyz data.
3954 */
3955 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagSegs.iterator();
3956 while (its.hasNext()) {
3957 items=(Vector<String>)its.next();
3958 str=(String)items.get(0);
3959 items.remove(0); // there must be at least one flag first
3960 if (StringUtil.isFlag(str)) {
3961 switch(str.charAt(1)) {
3962 case 'q': // compare area to pack q
3963 {
3964 int qnum=StringUtil.qFlagParse(str);
3965 if (qnum==-2) { // old style flag '-q {p}' (with space)
3966 try {
3967 qnum=Integer.parseInt((String)items.get(0));
3968 } catch (Exception ex) {}
3969 }
3970 if (qnum<0 || qnum>=CPBase.NUM_PACKS)
3971 throw new ParserException();
3972 qackData=PackControl.cpDrawing[qnum].getPackData();
3973 break;
3974 }
3975 case 'm':
3976 {
3977 maxdil=Double.parseDouble(items.get(0));
3978 items.remove(0);
3979 break;
3980 }
3981 case 'n':
3982 {
3983 compare=false;
3984// String filename=items.remove(0);
3985 items.remove(0);
3986 // TODO: figure out how to read, store data for use.
3987 items.remove(0);
3988 break;
3989 }
3990 case 's':
3991 {
3992 compare=false;
3993// String filename=items.remove(0);
3994 items.remove(0);
3995 // TODO: figure out how to read, store data for use.
3996 items.remove(0);
3997 break;
3998 }
3999 case 'x':
4000 {
4001 compare=false;
4002 if (xyzpoint==null) {
4003 flashError("color error: no xyz-data is stored for this packing");
4004 return 0;
4005 }
4006 break;
4007 }
4008 default:
4009 {
4010 throw new ParserException();
4011 }
4012 } // end of switch
4013 }
4014 } // end of while
4015
4016 // now to do the computations:
4017 if (compare) {
4018 maxdil=color_qc_map(qackData,maxdil);
4019 }
4020 else {
4021 maxdil=color_qc_xyz(xyzpoint,faceCount,maxdil);
4022 }
4023 if (maxdil<0.0) {
4024 flashError("color 'qc' option has failed");
4025 return 0;
4026 }
4027 CirclePack.cpb.msg("color qc; maximal dilataion was "+maxdil);
4028 return 1;
4029 }
4030
4037 public int color_face_interp(double []values) {
4038 int count=0;
4039 double max=-100000;
4040 double min=100000;
4041 int mid=(int)(ColorUtil.color_ramp_size/2);
4042 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
4043 max = (values[v]>max) ? values[v] : max;
4044 min = (values[v]<min && values[v]>0.0) ? values[v] : min;
4045 }
4046
4047 // spread colors from smaller of 'min' and 'max'/2 to 'max'
4048 min= (min>max/2.0) ? max/2.0:min;
4049
4050 // color based on average of values at vertices
4051 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) {
4052 int[] vts=packDCEL.faces[f].getVerts();
4053 int num=packDCEL.faces[f].getNum();
4054 double accum=0.0;
4055 for (int j=0;j<num;j++)
4056 accum+=values[vts[j]];
4057 accum /=num;
4058 if (accum>=min)
4059 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(mid+1+(int)((mid-2)*(accum-min)/max))));
4060 else
4061 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.getBGColor());
4062 count++;
4063 }
4064 return count;
4065 }
4066
4079 public double color_qc_map(PackData q,double maxdil) {
4080 double []dil;
4081
4082 if (!q.status || q.nodeCount<3) {
4083 throw new ParserException("Packing 'q' appears empty");
4084 }
4085 int mid=(int)(ColorUtil.color_ramp_size/2);
