4086 dil=new double[faceCount+1];
4087 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) dil[f]=1.0; // default
4088 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) {
4089 if ((dil[f]=face_dilatation(q,f))<0.0)
4090 dil[f]=-1.0;
4091 }
4092 double kmax=1.0;
4093 for (int i=1;i<=faceCount;i++)
4094 kmax = (dil[i]>kmax) ? dil[i] : kmax;
4095 if (kmax<1.0001) kmax=1.0001; // allow for roundoff, eg, so identity gets pale colors
4096 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) {
4097 if (dil[f]>0 && dil[f]<=maxdil)
4098 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(mid+1+(int)((mid-2)*(dil[f]-1.0)/(maxdil-1.0)))));
4099 else if (dil[f]>0)
4100 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(2))); // over ceiling? dark blue.
4101 else
4102 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(1))); // couldn't compute? black
4103 }
4104 return kmax;
4105 }
4106
4131 public double color_qc_xyz(Point3D []xyz_list,int xyzcount,double maxdil) {
4132 double []dil;
4133
4134 int mid=(int)(ColorUtil.color_ramp_size/2);
4135 dil=new double[faceCount+1];
4136 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) dil[f]=1.0; // default
4137
4138 double A,B,C,a,b,c;
4139 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) {
4140 int[] verts=packDCEL.faces[f].getVerts();
4141 if (verts[0]<=xyzcount && verts[1]<=xyzcount &&
4142 verts[2]<=xyzcount) {
4143 // yes, we have xyz locations for these
4144
4145 // need euclidean side lengths A, B, C
4146 Point3D []pt=new Point3D[3];
4147 if (hes>0) { // sph
4148 for (int j=0;j<3;j++)
4149 pt[j]=new Point3D(getCenter(verts[j]));
4150 }
4151 if (hes<0) { // hyp
4152 CircleSimple sc=null;
4153 for (int j=0;j<3;j++) {
4154 sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(verts[j]),
4155 getRadius(verts[j]));
4156 pt[j]=new Point3D(sc.center);
4157 }
4158 }
4159 else {
4160 Complex z;
4161 for (int j=0;j<3;j++) {
4162 z=getCenter(verts[j]);
4163 pt[j]=new Point3D(z.x,z.y,0.0);
4164 }
4165 }
4166
4167 // eucl edge lengths in packing
4168 A=Point3D.distance(pt[0],pt[1]);
4169 B=Point3D.distance(pt[1],pt[2]);
4170 C=Point3D.distance(pt[2],pt[0]);
4171
4172 // eucl edge lengths in xyz data
4173 a=Math.sqrt(
4174 (xyz_list[verts[0]].x-xyz_list[verts[1]].x)*
4175 (xyz_list[verts[0]].x-xyz_list[verts[1]].x)
4176 + (xyz_list[verts[0]].y-xyz_list[verts[1]].y)*
4177 (xyz_list[verts[0]].y-xyz_list[verts[1]].y)
4178 + (xyz_list[verts[0]].z-xyz_list[verts[1]].z)*
4179 (xyz_list[verts[0]].z-xyz_list[verts[1]].z));
4180 b=Math.sqrt(
4181 (xyz_list[verts[2]].x-xyz_list[verts[1]].x)*
4182 (xyz_list[verts[2]].x-xyz_list[verts[1]].x)
4183 + (xyz_list[verts[2]].y-xyz_list[verts[1]].y)*
4184 (xyz_list[verts[2]].y-xyz_list[verts[1]].y)
4185 + (xyz_list[verts[2]].z-xyz_list[verts[1]].z)*
4186 (xyz_list[verts[2]].z-xyz_list[verts[1]].z));
4187 c=Math.sqrt(
4188 (xyz_list[verts[0]].x-xyz_list[verts[2]].x)*
4189 (xyz_list[verts[0]].x-xyz_list[verts[2]].x)
4190 + (xyz_list[verts[0]].y-xyz_list[verts[2]].y)*
4191 (xyz_list[verts[0]].y-xyz_list[verts[2]].y)
4192 + (xyz_list[verts[0]].z-xyz_list[verts[2]].z)*
4193 (xyz_list[verts[0]].z-xyz_list[verts[2]].z));
4194
4195 // compute dilatation
4196 dil[f-1]=EuclMath.e_dilatation(A,B,C,a,b,c);
4197 }
4198 }
4199 double realMax=0.0;
4200 for (int ii=1;ii<=faceCount;ii++)
4201 realMax = (dil[ii]>realMax) ? dil[ii] : realMax;
4202 for (int f=1;f<=faceCount;f++) {
4203 if (dil[f]>0 && dil[f]<=maxdil)
4204 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(mid+1+(int)((mid-2)*(dil[f]-1.0)/(maxdil-1.0)))));
4205 else if (dil[f]>0)
4206 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(2))); // over ceiling? dark blue.
4207 else
4208 setFaceColor(f,ColorUtil.cloneMe(ColorUtil.coLor(1))); // couldn't compute? black
4209 }
4210 return realMax;
4211 }
4212
4230 public double face_dilatation(PackData q,int face) {
4231
4232 // eucl lengths from 'this'
4233 double A,B,C;
4234 int[] fverts=getFaceVerts(face);
4235 Complex z0 = getCenter(fverts[0]);
4236 Complex z1 = getCenter(fverts[1]);
4237 Complex z2 = getCenter(fverts[2]);
4238 if (hes<=0) { // hyp or eucl
4239 A=z0.minus(z1).abs();
4240 B=z1.minus(z2).abs();
4241 C=z2.minus(z0).abs();
4242 }
4243 else { // sph
4244 A=SphericalMath.eucl_dist3D(z0,z1);
4245 B=SphericalMath.eucl_dist3D(z1,z2);
4246 C=SphericalMath.eucl_dist3D(z2,z0);
4247 }
4248
4249 // eucl lengths from 'this'
4250 double a,b,c;
4251 z0 = q.getCenter(fverts[0]);
4252 z1 = q.getCenter(fverts[1]);
4253 z2 = q.getCenter(fverts[2]);
4254 if (q.hes<=0) { // hyp or eucl
4255 a=z0.minus(z1).abs();
4256 b=z1.minus(z2).abs();
4257 c=z2.minus(z0).abs();
4258 }
4259 else { // sph
4260 a=SphericalMath.eucl_dist3D(z0,z1);
4261 b=SphericalMath.eucl_dist3D(z1,z2);
4262 c=SphericalMath.eucl_dist3D(z2,z0);
4263 }
4264
4265 return EuclMath.e_dilatation(A,B,C,a,b,c);
4266 }
4267
4279 public PackData copyPackTo() {
4280 return copyPackTo(true);
4281 }
4282
4289 public PackData copyPackTo(boolean keepTD) {
4290 PackData p=new PackData(null);
4291 p.fileName=fileName;
4292 p.hes=hes;
4293 PackDCEL pdcel=CombDCEL.cloneDCEL(packDCEL);
4294 pdcel.fixDCEL(p);
4295
4296 // TODO: check more stuff to copy over
4297 p.intNodeCount=intNodeCount;
4298 p.euler=euler;
4299 p.genus=genus;
4300 p.intrinsicGeom=intrinsicGeom;
4301 p.activeNode=activeNode;
4302
4303 // copy tile data, if it exists
4304 if (keepTD && tileData!=null && tileData.tileCount>0) {
4305 p.tileData=tileData.copyMyTileData();
4306 TileData.setPackings(p.tileData,p);
4307 }
4308
4309 // TODO: Prefer to make copy of layout in case face order
4310 // red chain, etc. are specially tailored. Need to spend
4311 // some effort to copy everything correctly.
4312
4313 // copy xyz data
4314 if (xyzpoint!=null) {
4315 p.xyzpoint=new Point3D[nodeCount+1];
4316 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++)
4317 p.xyzpoint[i]=xyzpoint[i];
4318 }
4319 p.status=true;
4320 return p;
4321 }
4322
4330 public int labellist(LinkedList<Integer> llist,int msg_flag,boolean circles) {
4331 if (llist==null) return 0;
4332 Iterator<Integer> list=llist.iterator();
4333
4334 int n,count=0;
4335 if (circles) {
4336 while (list.hasNext()) {
4337 n=(Integer)list.next();
4338 cpDrawing.drawIndex(getCenter(n),n,msg_flag);
4339 count++;
4340 }
4341 return count;
4342 }
4343 while (list.hasNext()) {
4344 n=(Integer)list.next();
4345 cpDrawing.drawIndex(getFaceCenter(n),n,msg_flag);
4346 count++;
4347 }
4348 // last_index_global=v; ???
4349 return count;
4350 }
4351
4360 public NodeLink cir_search(Complex z) {
4361 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink(this);
4362 if (hes>0) {
4363 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4364 if ( (SphericalMath.s_dist(z,getCenter(i))<getRadius(i)))
4365// && kData[i].plotFlag>0)
4366 vlist.add(i);
4367 }
4368 }
4369 else {
4370 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4371 if (pt_in_cir(i,z)!=0) { // OBE??? && kData[i].plotFlag>0) {
4372 vlist.add(i);
4373 }
4374 }
4375 }
4376 if (vlist.size()==0)
4377 return (NodeLink)null;
4378 return vlist;
4379 }
4380
4389 public NodeLink cir_closest(Complex z,boolean inside) {
4390 NodeLink vlist=new NodeLink(this);
4391
4392 double dist=100000000;
4393 double mydist=100000000;
4394 int vert=0;
4395 if (hes>0) {
4396 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4397 mydist=SphericalMath.s_dist(z,getCenter(i));
4398 if (mydist<getRadius(i))
4399// && kData[i].plotFlag>0)
4400 vlist.add(i);
4401 if (mydist<dist) {
4402 dist = mydist;
4403 vert=i;
4404 }
4405 }
4406 }
4407 else {
4408 Complex ectr;
4409 double rad=0.0;
4410 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4411 if (hes<0) {
4412 CircleSimple sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(i),getRadius(i));
4413 ectr=sc.center;
4414 rad=sc.rad;
4415 }
4416 else {
4417 ectr=getCenter(i);
4418 rad=getRadius(i);
4419 }
4420 mydist=z.minus(ectr).abs();
4421 if (mydist<rad)
4422// && kData[i].plotFlag>0)
4423 vlist.add(i);
4424 if (mydist<dist) {
4425 dist = mydist;
4426 vert=i;
4427 }
4428 }
4429 }
4430 if (inside) {
4431 if (vlist.size()==0) return null;
4432 return vlist;
4433 }
4434 if (vert<=0) return null; // error
4435 vlist=new NodeLink(this);
4436 vlist.add(vert);
4437 return vlist;
4438 }
4439
4456 public EdgeLink edge_search(Complex z) {
4457 int face = 0;
4458 CircleSimple sc = null;
4459 EdgeLink goit = null;
4460// Complex cent = null;
4461
4462 // simply connected case
4463 if (isSimplyConnected()) {
4464 // is z in a face? (take first found):
4465 FaceLink tlist = tri_search(z);
4466 if (tlist != null && tlist.size() > 0)
4467 face = (Integer) tlist.get(0);
4468 else {
4469 if (getBdryCompCount()==0)
4470 return null; // no boundary
4471
4472 // first, find closest bdry circle
4473 double best, td;
4474 int bestj = bdryStarts[1];
4475 best = geom_dist(z, bestj);
4476 for (int j = 1; j <= nodeCount; j++) {
4477 if (isBdry(j)) { // check bdry only
4478 td = geom_dist(z, j);
4479 if (td < best) {
4480 best = td;
4481 bestj = j;
4482 }
4483 }
4484 }
4485
4486 // Find closer of two neighbors (in eucl distance in hyp/eucl).
4487 int jup = getLastPetal(bestj);
4488 int jdown = getFirstPetal(bestj);
4489 goit = new EdgeLink(this);
4490 best = geom_dist(z, jup);
4491 if (geom_dist(z, jdown) < best)
4492 goit.add(new EdgeSimple(bestj, jdown));
4493 else
4494 goit.add(new EdgeSimple(bestj, jup));
4495 return goit;
4496 }
4497
4498 // Reaching here, have containing face; find closest (eucl) edge.
4499 // return null if z is too close to a vertex.
4500 int[] vert = this.getFaceVerts(face);
4501 double[] edgelen = new double[3];
4502 double dist;
4503
4504 // find minimum edge length
4505 double minlen = edgelen[0] = geom_dist(getCenter(vert[0]),
4506 vert[1]);
4507 edgelen[1] = geom_dist(getCenter(vert[1]), vert[2]);
4508 edgelen[2] = geom_dist(getCenter(vert[2]), vert[0]);
4509 minlen = (edgelen[1] < minlen) ? edgelen[1] : minlen;
4510 minlen = (edgelen[2] < minlen) ? edgelen[2] : minlen;
4511
4512 // find min distance from z to vertices
4513 double mindist = geom_dist(z, vert[0]);
4514 mindist = ((dist = geom_dist(z, vert[1])) < mindist) ? dist
4515 : mindist;
4516 mindist = ((dist = geom_dist(z, vert[2])) < mindist) ? dist
4517 : mindist;
4518 if (mindist < (.1) * minlen || minlen < (.1) * mindist)
4519 return null;
4520
4521 // find which line is closest
4522 double []lindist=new double[3];
4523 if (hes <= 0) { // hyp/eucl
4524 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
4525 lindist[j] = EuclMath.dist_to_line(z,
4526 getCenter(vert[j]),
4527 getCenter(vert[(j + 1) % 3]));
4528 }
4529 } else { // spherical
4530 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
4531 lindist[j] = SphericalMath.s_dist_pt_to_line(z,
4532 getCenter(vert[j]),
4533 getCenter(vert[(j + 1) % 3]));
4534 }
4535 }
4536 int v = 0;
4537 double shortest = lindist[0];
4538 if (lindist[1] < shortest) {
4539 v = 1;
4540 shortest = lindist[1];
4541 }
4542 if (lindist[2] < shortest) {
4543 v = 2;
4544 }
4545
4546 // want closest center to be first vert in the edge
4547 int e1=vert[v];
4548 int e2=vert[(v+1)%3];
4549 Complex z1=getCenter(e1);
4550 Complex z2=getCenter(e2);
4551 if (hes>0) {
4552 edgelen[1]=SphericalMath.s_dist(z1,z);
4553 edgelen[2]=SphericalMath.s_dist(z2,z);
4554 }
4555 else if (hes<0 && z.abs()<.999) {
4556 edgelen[1]=HyperbolicMath.h_dist(z1,z);
4557 edgelen[2]=HyperbolicMath.h_dist(z2,z);
4558 }
4559 else {
4560 edgelen[1]=z1.minus(z).abs();
4561 edgelen[2]=z2.minus(z).abs();
4562 }
4563
4564 if (edgelen[1]<getRadius(e1) && edgelen[2]>getRadius(e2)); // okay
4565 else if (edgelen[1]>getRadius(e1) && edgelen[2]<getRadius(e2)
4566 || edgelen[2]<edgelen[1]) { // switch order
4567 int hold=e1;
4568 e1=e2;
4569 e2=hold;
4570 }
4571
4572 return new EdgeLink(this, new EdgeSimple(e1,e2));
4573
4574 } // end of simply connected case
4575
4576 // otherwise, multiply connected
4577 double mindist = 0.0, dist = 0.0;
4578
4579 // TODO: multiply connected sphere case
4580 if (hes > 0)
4581 return null; // not yet ready for sphere case
4582
4583 if (hes < 0 && z.abs() >= 1.0)
4584 return null; // z not in disc
4585
4586 // is z actually in a circle? (use first found)
4587 int circle = 0;
4588 NodeLink vlist = cir_search(z);
4589 if (vlist != null && vlist.size() > 0) {
4590 circle = (Integer) vlist.get(0);
4591 }
4592 // if not, look for closest circle; we use eucl computations
4593 else {
4594 circle = 1;
4595 Complex cent = getCenter(circle);
4596 if (hes < 0) {
4597 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(cent, getRadius(circle));
4598 cent = new Complex(sc.center);
4599 }
4600 mindist = z.minus(cent).abs();
4601 for (int j = 2; j <= nodeCount; j++) {
4602 cent = getCenter(j);
4603 if (hes < 0) {
4604 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(cent,getRadius(j));
4605 cent = new Complex(sc.center);
4606 } else
4607 dist = z.minus(cent).abs();
4608 if (dist < mindist) {
4609 mindist = dist;
4610 circle = j;
4611 }
4612 }
4613 }
4614
4615 // now, have the closest circle; use arguments to choose petal
4616 double crad = getRadius(circle);
4617 Complex ccent = getCenter(circle);
4618 if (hes < 0) {
4619 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(ccent, crad);
4620 ccent = new Complex(sc.center);
4621 }
4622
4623// mindist=ccent.minus(z).abs();
4624
4625 // too close/far from center, too ambiguous ro .
4626// if (mindist > 1.5 * crad || mindist < .005 * crad)
4627// return null;
4628
4629// if (hes < 0) {
4630// sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(ccent, rData[circle].rad);
4631// ccent = new Complex(sc.center);
4632// }
4633
4634 // load vector of complex arguments of directions to petals
4635 Complex fz;
4636 int num = countFaces(circle);
4637 double[] args = new double[num + 1];
4638 int[] petals=getPetals(circle);
4639 for (int k = 0; k < petals.length; k++) {
4640 int j = petals[k];
4641 fz = getCenter(j);
4642 if (hes < 0) {
4643 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(fz, getRadius(j));
4644 fz = new Complex(sc.center);
4645 }
4646 args[k] = ccent.minus(fz).arg();
4647 }
4648
4649 double argz = ccent.minus(z).arg();// arg from center to z
4650
4651 // find point with closest argument
4652 int thepetal = 0;
4653 mindist = Math.abs(argz - args[0]);
4654 double pi2 = 2.0 * Math.PI;
4655 if (mindist >= pi2)
4656 mindist -= pi2;
4657 for (int k = 1; k < petals.length; k++) {
4658 dist = Math.abs(argz - args[k]);
4659 if (dist >= pi2)
4660 dist -= pi2;
4661 if (dist < mindist) {
4662 mindist = dist;
4663 thepetal = k;
4664 }
4665 }
4666
4667 // done
4668 goit = new EdgeLink(this);
4669 goit.add(new EdgeSimple(circle,petals[thepetal]));
4670 return goit;
4671 }
4672
4677 public double geom_dist(Complex z,int v) {
4678 Complex cent=getCenter(v);
4679 if (hes>0) { // spherical
4680 return SphericalMath.s_dist(cent,z);
4681 }
4682 if (hes<0) { // hyp
4683 CircleSimple sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(cent,getRadius(v));
4684 cent=sc.center;
4685 }
4686 return z.minus(cent).abs();
4687 }
4688
4695 public int pt_in_cir(int n,Complex z) {
4696 double rad=.5;
4697 Complex w;
4698 Complex ectr=null;
4699
4700 if (hes>0) {
4701 if (SphericalMath.s_dist(z,getCenter(n))<getRadius(n))
4702 return 1;
4703 return 0;
4704 }
4705 if (hes<0) {
4706 CircleSimple sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(n),getRadius(n));
4707 ectr=sc.center;
4708 rad=sc.rad;
4709 }
4710 else if (hes==0) {
4711 rad=getRadius(n);
4712 ectr=getCenter(n);
4713 }
4714 w=z.minus(ectr);
4715 if (w.abs()<rad)
4716 return 1;
4717 return 0;
4718 }
4719
4728 public FaceLink tri_search(Complex z) {
4729 FaceLink nodelist=new FaceLink(this);
4730 for (int j=1;j<=faceCount;j++) {
4731 if (pt_in_tri(j,z)!=0)
4732 nodelist.add(j);
4733 }
4734 return nodelist;
4735 }
4736
4743 public int pt_in_tri(int f, Complex z) {
4744 Complex[] ctr = getFaceCorners(f);
4745 if (CommonMath.pt_in_triangle(z, ctr[0],ctr[1],ctr[2],hes))
4746 return 1;
4747 return 0;
4748 }
4749
4750 public static double row_col(double x,double y,double xa,double xb,
4751 double ya,double yb) {
4752 return (x*(ya-yb)-y*(xa-xb)+xa*yb-xb*ya);
4753 }
4754
4763 public int puncture_vert(int v) {
4764 PackDCEL newDCEL=CombDCEL.puncture_vert(packDCEL, v);
4765 if (newDCEL==null) {
4766 throw new DCELException("DCEL puncture for "+v+" failed");
4767 }
4768 attachDCEL(newDCEL);
4769 packDCEL.oldNew=null;
4770 return 1;
4771 }
4772
4782 public int puncture_face(int f) {
4783 if (f<1 || f>faceCount)
4784 return 0;
4785 PackDCEL newDCEL=CombDCEL.puncture_face(packDCEL, f);
4786 if (newDCEL==null) {
4787 throw new DCELException("DCEL puncturing face "+f+" failed");
4788 }
4789 attachDCEL(newDCEL);
4790 packDCEL.oldNew=null;
4791 return 1;
4792 }
4793
4800 public int hex_refine() {
4801 RawManip.hexBaryRefine_raw(packDCEL,false);
4802 // DCELdebug.printRedChain(packDCEL.redChain);
4803 packDCEL.fixDCEL(this);
4804 return 1;
4805 }
4806
4812 public int set_xyz_data() {
4813 xyzpoint=new Point3D[nodeCount+1];
4814 if (hes>0) { // spherical
4815 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4816 Complex z=getCenter(i);
4817 xyzpoint[i]=new Point3D(Math.sin(z.y)*Math.cos(z.x),
4818 Math.sin(z.y)*Math.sin(z.x),Math.cos(z.y));
4819 }
4820 return 1;
4821 }
4822 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic ((x,y) only)
4823 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4824 CircleSimple sc=HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCenter(i),getRadius(i));
4825 xyzpoint[i]=new Point3D(sc.center.x,sc.center.y,0.0);
4826 }
4827 return 1;
4828 }
4829 else { // euclidean ((x,y) only)
4830 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++) {
4831 xyzpoint[i]=new Point3D(getCenter(i).x,getCenter(i).y,0.0);
4832 }
4833 return 1;
4834 }
4835 }
4836
4854 public int set_xyz_overlaps(Point3D[] xyz_list,int flag) {
4855
4856 // right size list?
4857 if (!status || xyz_list==null || xyz_list.length!=nodeCount) {
4858 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("usage: 'set_xyz_overlaps': recorded 'xyz' "+
4859 "data is not correct size");
4860 return 0;
4861 }
4862
4863 double miN = 1000000000.0, maX = 0.0;
4864 double ivdmax= OKERR, ivdmin = 1000;
4865
4866 if (flag == 1) { // treat as though all radii were miN/2.
4867
4868 // compute maX/miN distances
4869 for (int i = 1; i <= nodeCount; i++) {
4870 int[] petals=getPetals(i);
4871 int k;
4872 for (int j = 0; j < petals.length; j++)
4873 if ((k = petals[j]) > i && i <= nodeCount
4874 && k <= nodeCount) {
4875 double dist = EuclMath.xyz_dist(xyz_list[i], xyz_list[k]);
4876 miN = (dist < miN) ? dist : miN;
4877 maX = (dist > maX) ? dist : maX;
4878 }
4879 }
4880 if (miN == 1000000000.0 || maX == 0.0 || (miN < OKERR))
4881 return 0; // ??
4882 double rad = miN / 2.0;
4883 // compute and store overlaps
4884 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
4885 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
4886 HalfLink spokes=vert.getEdgeFlower();
4887 Iterator<HalfEdge> sis=spokes.iterator();
4888 while (sis.hasNext()) {
4889 HalfEdge he=sis.next();
4890 int w=he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
4891 if (v<w) {
4892 double ivd = xyz_inv_dist(xyz_list[v], xyz_list[w], rad, rad);
4893 he.setInvDist(ivd);
4894 ivdmax = (ivd > ivdmax) ? ivd : ivdmax;
4895 ivdmin = (ivd < ivdmin) ? ivd : ivdmin;
4896 }
4897 }
4898 }
4899 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Set overlaps using "
4900 + "euclidean 3-space distances.\n"
4901 + " side lengths: max = " + maX + ", max/min = "
4902 + (maX / miN) + "\n" + " radius " + rad + "\n"
4903 + " inv distance: max = " + ivdmax + ", min = " + ivdmin);
4904 return 1;
4905 }
4906 if (flag == 2) { /*
4907 * set as though each vertex v radius was 1/2 the
4908 * minimum eldg length from v.
4909 */
4910 // compute temporary radii
4911 double[] tmprads = new double[nodeCount + 2];
4912 for (int i = 1; i <= nodeCount; i++) {
4913 miN = 100000000;
4914 int[] petals=getPetals(i);
4915 int k;
4916 for (int j = 0; j < petals.length; j++) {
4917 if ((k = petals[j]) != 0 && i <= nodeCount
4918 && k <= nodeCount) {
4919 double dist = Math.sqrt((xyz_list[i].x - xyz_list[k].x)
4920 * (xyz_list[i].x - xyz_list[k].x)
4921 + (xyz_list[i].y - xyz_list[k].y)
4922 * (xyz_list[i].y - xyz_list[k].y)
4923 + (xyz_list[i].z - xyz_list[k].z)
4924 * (xyz_list[i].z - xyz_list[k].z));
4925 miN = (dist < miN) ? dist : miN;
4926 }
4927 }
4928 tmprads[i] = miN / 2.0;
4929 }
4930 // compute and store overlaps
4931 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
4932 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
4933 HalfLink spokes=vert.getEdgeFlower();
4934 Iterator<HalfEdge> sis=spokes.iterator();
4935 while (sis.hasNext()) {
4936 HalfEdge he=sis.next();
4937 int w=he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
4938 if (v<w) {
4939 double ivd =xyz_inv_dist(xyz_list[v], xyz_list[w],
4940 tmprads[v], tmprads[w]);
4941 he.setInvDist(ivd);
4942 ivdmax = (ivd > ivdmax) ? ivd : ivdmax;
4943 ivdmin = (ivd < ivdmin) ? ivd : ivdmin;
4944 }
4945 }
4946 }
4947 CirclePack.cpb.msg("Set overlaps using "
4948 + "euclidean 3-space distances and for each vert v, \n"
4949 + " use 1/2 the length of the shortest edge from v .\n"
4950 + " inv distances: max = " + ivdmax + ", min = " + ivdmin);
4951 return 1;
4952 }
4953 return 0;
4954 }
4955
4965 public int eucl_scale(double factor) {
4966 CircleSimple sc = null;
4967 boolean hyp_out = false;
4968
4969 if (hes < 0) { // hyp
4970 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
4971 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(getCircleSimple(v));
4972 sc = HyperbolicMath.e_to_h_data(sc.center.times(factor),
4973 sc.rad*factor);
4974 if (sc.flag == 0)
4975 hyp_out = true; // circle was forced into disc
4976 setCenter(v,sc.center);
4977 setRadius(v,sc.rad);
4978 }
4979 if (packDCEL.redChain != null) {
4980 RedEdge rtrace = packDCEL.redChain;
4981 do {
4982 sc = HyperbolicMath.h_to_e_data(rtrace.getCenter(),
4983 rtrace.getRadius());
4984 sc = HyperbolicMath.e_to_h_data(sc.center.times(factor),
4985 sc.rad*factor);
4986 rtrace.setCenter(sc.center);
4987 rtrace.setRadius(sc.rad);
4988 rtrace = rtrace.nextRed;
4989 } while (rtrace != packDCEL.redChain);
4990 }
4991 fillcurves();
4992 } else if (hes>0) { // deBugging.LayoutBugs.log_RedCenters(this);
4993 Mobius Mob = new Mobius();
4994 Mob.a.x = factor;
4995 NodeLink vlist = new NodeLink(this, "a");
4996 apply_Mobius(Mob, vlist);
4997 }
4998 else { // euclidean
4999 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
5000 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
5001 if (vert.redFlag) {
5002 // store in 'Vertex'
5003 vert.center=new Complex(vert.center.times(factor));
5004 vert.rad=vert.rad*factor;
5005
5006 // v may also be origin of one or more red edges
5007 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
5008 do {
5009 if (he.myRedEdge!=null) {
5010 he.myRedEdge.setCenter(he.myRedEdge.getCenter().times(factor));
5011 he.myRedEdge.setRadius(he.myRedEdge.getRadius()*factor);
5012 }
5013 he=he.prev.twin; // cclw
5014 } while (he!=vert.halfedge);
5015 }
5016 else {
5017 packDCEL.setVertCenter(v,vert.center.times(factor));
5018 packDCEL.setVertRadii(v,packDCEL.getVertRadius(vert.halfedge)*factor);
5019 }
5020 }
5021 }
5022 if (hyp_out) {
5023 CirclePack.cpb.msg("eucl_scale: hyperbolic "
5024 + "circle(s) were pushed back " + "into the disc");
5025 }
5026 return 1;
5027 }
5028
5036 public int rotate(double ang) {
5037 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(this,"a");
5038 if (hes>0) { // do sph case using Mobius
5039 Mobius mob=Mobius.rotation(ang/Math.PI);
5040 return apply_Mobius(mob,vertlist,true,true);
5041 }
5042 // else directly rotate
5043 int count=0;
5044 Complex rot=new Complex(0,ang).exp();
5045 Iterator<Integer> vlst=vertlist.iterator();
5046 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
5047 int v=vlst.next();
5048 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
5049 if (vert.redFlag) {
5050 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
5051 // may red edges from vert with different centers
5052 do {
5053 if (he.myRedEdge!=null) {
5054 Complex cent=he.myRedEdge.getCenter();
5055 he.myRedEdge.setCenter(cent.times(rot));
5056 count++;
5057 }
5058 he=he.prev.twin; // cclw
5059 } while (he!=vert.halfedge);
5060
5061 // also rotate 'Vertex.center'
5062 vert.center=new Complex(vert.center.times(rot));
5063 }
5064 else {
5065 packDCEL.setVertCenter(v,vert.center.times(rot));
5066 count++;
5067 }
5068 }
5069 return count;
5070 }
5071
5087 public static PackData adjoinCall(PackData p1,
5088 PackData p2,int v1,int v2,int n) {
5089 boolean debug=false;
5090 PackData newPack=null;
5091
5092 boolean selfadjoin=false;
5093 if (p1==p2)
5094 selfadjoin=true;
5095 else { // make enough space
5096 int sze = p1.nodeCount+p2.nodeCount+10;
5097 p1.packDCEL.alloc_vert_space(sze,true);
5098 }
5099
5100 // minimal legality test; later calls check further
5101 if ( !p1.status || !p2.status ||
5102 v1<=0 || v2<=0 || v1>p1.nodeCount || v2>p2.nodeCount ||
5103 (n>0 && p1.nodeCount<n) || (n>0 && p2.nodeCount<n))
5104 throw new ParserException("'adjoin' usage: data problem");
5105
5106 // create 'newPack'
5107 PackDCEL pdc1=CombDCEL.cloneDCEL(p1.packDCEL);
5108 PackDCEL pdc2=p2.packDCEL;
5109 if (!selfadjoin) {
5110 pdc2=CombDCEL.cloneDCEL(p2.packDCEL);
5111 }
5112 else
5113 pdc2=pdc1;
5114
5115 // here's the main call.
5116 PackDCEL newDCEL=CombDCEL.adjoin(pdc1, pdc2, v1, v2, n);
5117 VertexMap oldnew=newDCEL.oldNew;
5118 CombDCEL.redchain_by_edge(newDCEL, null, null, selfadjoin);
5119 CombDCEL.fillInside(newDCEL);
5120 newDCEL.oldNew=oldnew;
5121 newPack=new PackData(null);
5122 newPack.attachDCEL(newDCEL);
5123 PackDCEL pdcel=newPack.packDCEL;
5124 newPack.vertexMap=newDCEL.oldNew;
5125
5126 if (debug) // debug=true;
5127 DCELdebug.printRedChain(pdcel.redChain);
5128
5129 // copy the 'p1' info?
5130 if (selfadjoin)
5131 for (int v=1;v<=pdcel.vertCount;v++) {
5132 pdcel.vertices[v].cloneData(pdc1.vertices[v]);
5133 }
5134 else {
5135 // all 'p1' vertices should still be there, same indices
5136 for (int v=1;v<=p1.nodeCount;v++) {
5137 pdcel.vertices[v].cloneData(pdc1.vertices[v]);
5138 }
5139 // rest are from 'p2'.
5140 for (int v=p1.nodeCount+1;v<=pdcel.vertCount;v++) {
5141 Vertex vert=newPack.packDCEL.vertices[v];
5142 // 'old2v' is original index in 'qackData'
5143 int old2v=newPack.vertexMap.findV(v);
5144//System.out.println("<old2v,v>=<"+old2v+","+v+">");
5145 vert.cloneData(pdc2.vertices[old2v]);
5146 }
5147 }
5148
5149 // get red cent/rad from vData
5150 if (pdcel.redChain!=null) {
5151 RedEdge rtrace=pdcel.redChain;
5152 do {
5153 int v=rtrace.myEdge.origin.vertIndx;
5154 rtrace.setCenter(new Complex(newPack.packDCEL.vertices[v].center));
5155 rtrace.setRadius(newPack.packDCEL.vertices[v].rad);
5156 rtrace=rtrace.nextRed;
5157 } while (rtrace!=pdcel.redChain);
5158 }
5159
5160 // restablish certain things
5161 if (selfadjoin && p1.vlist!=null
5162 && newPack.vertexMap!=null && newPack.vertexMap.size()>0) {
5163 newPack.vlist=NodeLink.translate(p1.vlist,newPack.vertexMap);
5164 }
5165 // fix up elist
5166 if (selfadjoin && p1.elist!=null
5167 && newPack.vertexMap!=null && newPack.vertexMap.size()>0) {
5168 newPack.elist=EdgeLink.translate(p1.elist,newPack.vertexMap);
5169 }
5170
5171 // throw out certain things
5172 newPack.flist=null;
5173 newPack.glist=null;
5174 newPack.hlist=null;
5175 newPack.xyzpoint=null;
5176 newPack.packExtensions=new Vector<PackExtender>();
5177
5178 // update
5179 newPack.set_aim_default();
5180 newPack.fillcurves();
5181 newPack.status=true;
5182 return newPack;
5183 }
5184
5190 public double getSchwarzian(HalfEdge he) { // given <v,w>
5191 if (he==null)
5192 throw new DataException("schwarzian failure: "+
5193 "edge was null");
5194 return he.getSchwarzian();
5195 }
5196
5203 public int setSchwarzian(HalfEdge edge,double sch) {
5204 edge.setSchwarzian(sch);
5205 edge.twin.setSchwarzian(sch);
5206 return 1;
5207 }
5208
5216 public double getInvDist(int v,int w) {
5217 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(v,w);
5218 if (he!=null)
5219 return he.getInvDist();
5220 throw new CombException(
5221 "invDist error: <"+v+","+w+"> is not a valid edge");
5222 }
5223
5230 public RadIvdPacket getRIpacket(int f) {
5231 RadIvdPacket rip=new RadIvdPacket();
5232 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.faces[f].edge;
5233 int k=0;
5234 do {
5235 rip.rad[k]=getRadius(he.origin.vertIndx);
5236 rip.ivd[k]=he.getInvDist();
5237 he=he.next;
5238 k++;
5239 } while(k<3);
5240 return rip;
5241 }
5242
5256 public int set_single_invDist(int v,int w,double invDist) {
5257 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(v,w);
5258 if (he==null)
5259 throw new ParserException(
5260 "set_single_overlap error: "+w+" is not a petal of "+v);
5261 he.setInvDist(invDist);
5262 he.twin.setInvDist(invDist);
5263 return 1;
5264 }
5265
5285 public NodeLink path_construct(int mode,int v1,NodeLink vertlist) {
5286 int v,count=0,cur_vert;
5287
5288 NodeLink nlist=new NodeLink(this);
5289
5290 cur_vert=v1;
5291 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
5292 if (mode==0) { // pick off successive neighbors
5293 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
5294 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
5295 if (nghb(cur_vert,v)>=0) {
5296 nlist.add(v);
5297 cur_vert=v;
5298 count++;
5299 }
5300 }
5301 }
5302 else if (mode==1) { // first must nghb v1, sets comb direction.
5303 int inc,dir,deg;
5304 int v2=(Integer)vlist.next();
5305 if ((dir=nghb(v2,v1))<0) throw new ParserException();
5306 nlist.add(v2); // put v2 in the new list
5307 cur_vert=v2;
5308 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
5309 inc=(Integer)vlist.next();
5310 deg=countFaces(cur_vert);
5311 int ndir=dir+inc; // intended new direction
5312
5313 // at bdry? there are limits on ndir
5314 if (isBdry(cur_vert) && (ndir<0 || ndir>deg)) {
5315 if (count>0) return nlist;
5316 return null;
5317 }
5318 ndir=ndir % countFaces(cur_vert);
5319 int nvert=getPetal(cur_vert,ndir);
5320 if ((dir=nghb(nvert,cur_vert))<0) // comb error
5321 throw new CombException();
5322 nlist.add(nvert);
5323 count++;
5324 cur_vert=nvert;
5325 }
5326 }
5327 if (count>0) return nlist;
5328 return null;
5329 }
5330
5340 public EdgeSimple dualEdge(int v,int w) {
5341 if (nghb(v,w)<0) return null;
5342 int fr=face_right_of_edge(v,w);
5343 int fl=face_right_of_edge(w,v);
5344 if (fl>0 && fr>0 && fr!=fl) {
5345 return new EdgeSimple(fl,fr);
5346 }
5347 return null;
5348 }
5349
5358 public GraphLink dualEdges(EdgeLink elist) {
5359 GraphLink dlink=new GraphLink();
5360 if (elist==null || elist.size()==0)
5361 return null;
5362 Iterator<EdgeSimple> est=elist.iterator();
5363 EdgeSimple edge=null;
5364 while (est.hasNext()) {
5365 edge=est.next();
5366 EdgeSimple dedge=dualEdge(edge.v,edge.w);
5367 if (dedge!=null)
5368 dlink.add(dedge);
5369 }
5370 return dlink;
5371 }
5372
5378 public double dualLength(EdgeLink delist) {
5379 double totlen=0.0;
5380 Iterator<EdgeSimple> eit = delist.iterator();
5381 while (eit.hasNext()) {
5382 Complex[] pts=ends_dual_edge(eit.next());
5383 if (hes>0) {
5384 totlen += SphericalMath.s_dist(pts[0],pts[1]);
5385 }
5386 else if (hes<0) {
5387 totlen += HyperbolicMath.h_dist(pts[0],pts[1]);
5388 }
5389 else {
5390 totlen += pts[1].minus(pts[0]).abs();
5391 }
5392 }
5393 return totlen;
5394 }
5395
5404 public EdgeSimple reDualEdge(int f,int g) {
5405 if (f<1 || g<1 || f>faceCount || g>faceCount)
5406 return null;
5407 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace fface=packDCEL.faces[f];
5408 HalfEdge he=fface.faceNghb(packDCEL.faces[g]);
5409 if (he==null)
5410 return null;
5411 int v=he.origin.vertIndx;
5412 int w=he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
5413 return new EdgeSimple(v,w);
5414 }
5415
5426 public EdgeLink reDualEdges(GraphLink dlist) {
5427 EdgeLink elink=new EdgeLink(this);
5428 if (dlist==null || dlist.size()==0) return null;
5429 Iterator<EdgeSimple> dst=dlist.iterator();
5430 EdgeSimple edge=null;
5431 while (dst.hasNext()) {
5432 edge=dst.next();
5433 elink.add(reDualEdge(edge.v,edge.w));
5434 }
5435 return elink;
5436 }
5437
5446 public int flat_hex(NodeLink vertlist) {
5447 int count = 0;
5448
5449 Iterator<Integer> vlist = vertlist.iterator();
5450 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
5451 Vertex vert = packDCEL.vertices[vlist.next()];
5452 if (vert.isBdry() && vert.getNum() == 2) {
5453 HalfLink spokes=vert.getEdgeFlower();
5454 spokes.get(0).setInvDist(.5);
5455 spokes.get(1).setInvDist(-.5);
5456 spokes.get(2).setInvDist(.5);
5457 count++;
5458 }
5459 }
5460 return count;
5461 }
5462
5471 public int sq_grid_overlaps() {
5472 int count=0;
5473 double mcp2=Math.cos(Math.PI/2.0);
5474
5475 if (!status)
5476 return count;
5477 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
5478 if (!isBdry(v) && countFaces(v)==4) {
5479 HalfLink spokes=packDCEL.vertices[v].getSpokes(null);
5480 Iterator<HalfEdge> sis=spokes.iterator();
5481 while (sis.hasNext()) {
5482 HalfEdge he=sis.next();
5483 he.setInvDist(mcp2);
5484 }
5485 }
5486 }
5487 return count;
5488 }
5489
5497 public int center_point(Complex ctr) {
5498 Complex z1, z2;
5499 Complex z3 = new Complex(0.0);
5500
5501 if (hes<0) {
5502 if (ctr.absSq() > (1.0 - TOLER)) {
5503 flashError("usage: center_point: chosen point is too "
5504 + "close to or beyond the ideal boundary.");
5505 return 0;
5506 }
5507 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
5508 Vertex vert=packDCEL.vertices[v];
5509 // catch horocycles to modify their radii
5510 double radius = (-1)*vert.rad;
5511 if (radius > 0) { // yes, a horocycle
5512 z1 = vert.center;
5513 z2 = z1.times(1.0 - 2.0 * radius);
5514 z3.x = (1 - radius) * z1.x - radius * z1.y;
5515 z3.y = (1 - radius) * z1.y + radius * z1.x;
5516 z1 = Mobius.mob_trans(z1, ctr);
5517 z2 = Mobius.mob_trans(z2, ctr);
5518 z3 = Mobius.mob_trans(z3, ctr);
5519 CircleSimple sc = EuclMath.circle_3(z1, z2, z3);
5520 vert.rad=-sc.rad;
5521 }
5522 vert.center=Mobius.mob_trans(vert.center, ctr).times(-1.0);
5523 }
5524 if (packDCEL.redChain != null) { // adjust centers in red list
5525 RedEdge rtrace=packDCEL.redChain;
5526 do {
5527 double radius=-(rtrace.getRadius());
5528 // again, catch horocycles
5529 if (radius>0) {
5530 z1 = rtrace.getCenter();
5531 z2 = z1.times(1.0 - 2.0 * radius);
5532 z3.x = (1 - radius) * z1.x - radius * z1.y;
5533 z3.y = (1 - radius) * z1.y + radius * z1.x;
5534 z1 = Mobius.mob_trans(z1, ctr);
5535 z2 = Mobius.mob_trans(z2, ctr);
5536 z3 = Mobius.mob_trans(z3, ctr);
5537 CircleSimple sc = EuclMath.circle_3(z1, z2, z3);
5538 rtrace.setRadius(-sc.rad);
5539 }
5540 Complex tmpctr=Mobius.mob_trans(rtrace.getCenter(), ctr);
5541 rtrace.setCenter(tmpctr.times(-1.0));
5542 rtrace = rtrace.nextRed;
5543 } while (rtrace!=packDCEL.redChain);
5544 }
5545 }
5546
5547 // TODO: what's to happen in the case of the sphere?
5548 // (Note; there may still be red chain)
5549 else if (hes>0) { // sph
5550 Matrix3D m3d=Matrix3D.rigid2North(ctr);
5551 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
5552 Point3D pt=Matrix3D.times(m3d,new Point3D(getCenter(v)));
5553 setCenter(v,Point3D.p3D_2_sph(pt)); // pt.norm();
5554 }
5555 }
5556 else { // eucl
5557 for (int v = 1; v <= nodeCount; v++) {
5558 packDCEL.vertices[v].center=
5559 packDCEL.vertices[v].center.minus(ctr);
5560 }
5561 if (packDCEL.redChain != null) {
5562 RedEdge rtrace=packDCEL.redChain;
5563 do {
5564 rtrace.setCenter(rtrace.getCenter().minus(ctr));
5565 rtrace = rtrace.nextRed;
5566 } while (rtrace!=packDCEL.redChain);
5567 }
5568 }
5569 if (packDCEL.pairLink != null)
5570 // fix side-pairing mobius transforms also
5571 packDCEL.updatePairMob();
5572 return 1;
5573 }
5574
5578 public int set_centers(Complex ctr,NodeLink vertlist) {
5579 if (vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0)
5580 return 0;
5581 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
5582 int v;
5583 while(vlist.hasNext()) {
5584 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
5585 setCenter(v,ctr);
5586 }
5587 return 1;
5588 }
5589
5598 public static TriAspect[] getTriAspects(PackData p) {
5599 PackDCEL pdcel=p.packDCEL;
5600 TriAspect[] aspect=new TriAspect[p.faceCount+1];
5601 HalfLink hlink=pdcel.layoutOrder;
5602 hlink.abutMore(pdcel.stragglers);
5603 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
5604 int count=0;
5605 while (his.hasNext()) {
5606 DcelFace face=his.next().face;
5607
5608 TriAspect ta=aspect[face.faceIndx]=
5609 new TriAspect(pdcel,face);
5610 // compute/store the tangency points
5611 DualTri dtri=new DualTri(
5612 ta.getCenter(0),
5613 ta.getCenter(1),
5614 ta.getCenter(2),p.hes);
5615 ta.tanPts=new Complex[3];
5616 if (dtri.TangPts!=null) {
5617 for (int j=0;j<3;j++)
5618 ta.tanPts[j]=new Complex(dtri.TangPts[j]);
5619 count++;
5620 }
5621 ta.setBaseMobius();
5622 }
5623 if (count!=p.faceCount) {
5624 throw new CombException(
5625 "didn't get all faces in building 'TriAspect'");
5626 }
5627 return aspect;
5628 }
5629
5645 public int dataPutGet(PackData q,Vector<Vector<String>> flagsegs,
5646 boolean putget,boolean transl) {
5647
5648 if (q==null || !q.status)
5649 throw new ParserException(
5650 "'get/put_data': target packing null or 'status' false");
5651
5652 // look first for '-t', '-v', and '-V' flags
5653 boolean transflag=false;
5654 boolean vflag=false;
5655 boolean Vflag=false;
5656 Iterator<Vector<String>> its=flagsegs.iterator();
5657 while (its.hasNext()) {
5658 String str=its.next().get(0);
5659 if (str.startsWith("-t")) // usually this should occur first
5660 transflag=true;
5661 else if (str.startsWith("-v") || str.startsWith("-c"))
5662 vflag=true;
5663 else if (str.startsWith("-V"))
5664 Vflag=true;
5665 }
5666
5667 if (transflag && vertexMap==null) {
5668 flashError("usage: get/put_data: -t flag set but active packing p"+
5669 this.packNum+" has no 'vertexMap'.");
5670 return 0;
5671 }
5672
5673 // vflag and Vflag cases: copying/composing vertexMap's
5674 if (vflag && transflag && putget) { // copy 'this.vertexMap' to q
5675 if (vertexMap==null || vertexMap.size()==0) {
5676 flashError("this packing did not have a vertex map");
5677 return 0;
5678 }
5679 q.vertexMap=vertexMap.makeCopy();
5680 return q.vertexMap.size();
5681 }
5682 if (vflag && transflag && !putget) { // copy from q.vertexMap to 'this'
5683 if (q.vertexMap==null || q.vertexMap.size()==0) {
5684 flashError("second packing did not have a vertex map");
5685 return 0;
5686 }
5687 vertexMap=q.vertexMap.makeCopy();
5688 return vertexMap.size();
5689 }
5690 if (vflag && transflag && putget) { // compose: 'q.vertexMap' followed by 'vertexMap'
5691 VertexMap tvm=Translators.composeVMs(q.vertexMap,false,vertexMap,false);
5692 if (tvm==null || tvm.size()==0) {
5693 flashError("failed to compose vertex maps");
5694 return 0;
5695 }
5696 q.vertexMap=tvm;
5697 return tvm.size();
5698 }
5699 if (vflag && transflag && !putget) { // compose: 'vertexMap' followed by 'q.vertexMap'
5700 VertexMap tvm=Translators.composeVMs(vertexMap,false,q.vertexMap,false);
5701 if (tvm==null || tvm.size()==0) {
5702 flashError("failed to compose vertex maps");
5703 return 0;
5704 }
5705 vertexMap=tvm;
5706 return tvm.size();
5707 }
5708 if (Vflag && putget) { // compose
5709 VertexMap tvm=Translators.composeVMs(q.vertexMap,false,vertexMap,true);
5710 if (tvm==null || tvm.size()==0) {
5711 flashError("failed to compose vertex maps");
5712 return 0;
5713 }
5714 q.vertexMap=tvm;
5715 return tvm.size();
5716 }
5717 if (Vflag && !putget) { // compose
5718 VertexMap tvm=Translators.composeVMs(vertexMap,false,q.vertexMap,true);
5719 if (tvm==null || tvm.size()==0) {
5720 flashError("failed to compose vertex maps");
5721 return 0;
5722 }
5723 vertexMap=tvm;
5724 return tvm.size();
5725 }
5726
5727 // which way are things going?
5728 VertexMap vMap=vertexMap;
5729 PackData source_p=this;
5730 PackData target_p=q;
5731 if (!putget) {
5732 source_p=q;
5733 target_p=this;
5734 if (vertexMap!=null && vertexMap.size()>0)
5735 vMap=(VertexMap)vertexMap.flipEdgeEntries();
5736 }
5737 int count=0;
5738
5739 // 'flagSeg's as with commands: process in succession
5740
5741 // circle-related (followed by {v..})
5742 // * -z centers (same as -cz)
5743 // * -r radii (same as -cr)
5744 // * -a aims (same as -ca)
5745 // * -c[zrcma] multiple data types: c = color, m = mark
5746
5747 // face-related (followed by {f..})
5748 // * -f[mc] mark and/or color
5749 // NOTE: use face's vert triples rather than indices.
5750
5751 // edge-related (followed by {v w..})
5752 // * -e[mcis] mark, color, inv distance, and/or schwarzian
5753
5754 NodeLink vlink=null;
5755 FaceLink flink=null;
5756 HalfLink hlink=null;
5757 boolean cr=false;
5758 boolean cz=false;
5759 boolean ca=false;
5760
5761 its=flagsegs.iterator();
5762 while (its.hasNext()) {
5763 Vector<String> items=its.next();
5764 String flag=items.remove(0);
5765 // must be a flag
5766 // Note: on failure, previous actions remain in place
5767 if (!StringUtil.isFlag(flag))
5768 throw new ParserException("'put/get_data' flag missing");
5769
5770 // next get the appropriate list, "a" by default
5771 char c=flag.charAt(1);
5772 switch(c) {
5773 case 'f': // face-related
5774 {
5775 if (items.size()==0)
5776 flink=new FaceLink(this,"a");
5777 else
5778 flink=new FaceLink(this,items);
5779 break;
5780 }
5781 case 'e': //
5782 {
5783 if (items.size()==0)
5784 hlink=new HalfLink(this,"a");
5785 else
5786 hlink=new HalfLink(this,items);
5787 break;
5788 }
5789 case 'z': // fall through
5790 case 'r': // fall through
5791 case 'a': // fall through
5792 case 'c':
5793 {
5794 if (items.size()==0)
5795 vlink=new NodeLink(this,"a");
5796 else
5797 vlink=new NodeLink(this,items);
5798 break;
5799 }
5800 } // end of switch for list
5801
5802 // now for the action
5803 switch(c) {
5804 case 'f':
5805 {
5806 boolean fc=false;
5807 boolean fm=false;
5808 if (flag.contains("c"))
5809 fc=true;
5810 if (flag.contains("m"))
5811 fm=true;
5812 if (!fm && !fc) {
5813 flashError("face flag without c or m");
5814 return count;
5815 }
5816
5817 Iterator<Integer> fis=flink.iterator();
5818 while(fis.hasNext()) {
5819 int findx=fis.next();
5820 int nf=0;
5821 try {
5822 if ((nf=Translators.face_trans(source_p,
5823 target_p,findx,vMap))>0) {
5824 if (fc) {
5825 Color col=source_p.getFaceColor(findx);
5826 target_p.setFaceColor(nf,ColorUtil.cloneMe(col));
5827 count++;
5828 }
5829 if (fm) {
5830 target_p.setFaceMark(nf,source_p.getFaceMark(findx));
5831 count++;
5832 }
5833 }
5834 } catch (Exception ex) {}
5835 } // end of while through faces
5836 break;
5837 } // end of face case
5838 case 'e': // edges
5839 {
5840 boolean ec=false;
5841 boolean em=false;
5842 boolean ei=false;
5843 boolean es=false;
5844 boolean ez=false;
5845
5846 if (flag.contains("c"))
5847 ec=true;
5848 if (flag.contains("m"))
5849 em=true;
5850 if (flag.contains("i"))
5851 ei=true;
5852 if (flag.contains("s"))
5853 es=true;
5854 if (flag.contains("z"))
5855 ez=true;
5856 if (flag.contains("c"))
5857 ec=true;
5858
5859 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
5860 while (his.hasNext()) {
5861 HalfEdge he=his.next();
5862 int tv=he.origin.vertIndx;
5863 int tw=he.twin.origin.vertIndx;
5864 if (transflag) {
5865 tv=vMap.findW(tv);
5866 tw=vMap.findW(tw);
5867 }
5868 HalfEdge the=target_p.packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(tv,tw));
5869 if (the!=null) {
5870 if (ec) {
5871 the.setColor(he.getColor());
5872 count++;
5873 }
5874 if (em) {
5875 the.setMark(he.getMark());
5876 count++;
5877 }
5878 if (ei) {
5879 the.setInvDist(he.getInvDist());
5880 count++;
5881 }
5882 if (es) {
5883 the.setSchwarzian(he.getSchwarzian());
5884 count++;
5885 }
5886 if (ez) {
5887 Complex z=source_p.packDCEL.getVertCenter(he);
5888 target_p.packDCEL.setCent4Edge(the, z);
5889 }
5890 }
5891 } // end of while through edges
5892 break;
5893 } // end of edge case
5894 case 'z': // centers, fall through
5895 case 'r': // radii, fall through
5896 case 'a': // aims, fall through
5897 case 'c':
5898 {
5899 boolean cm=false;
5900 boolean cc=false;
5901 if (flag.contains("z"))
5902 cz=true;
5903 if (flag.contains("r"))
5904 cr=true;
5905 if (flag.contains("m"))
5906 cm=true;
5907 if (flag.contains("a"))
5908 ca=true;
5909 if (flag.indexOf('c',2)>0)
5910 cc=true;
5911
5912 Iterator<Integer> vis=vlink.iterator();
5913 while (vis.hasNext()) {
5914 int v=vis.next();
5915 int tv=v;
5916 if (transflag)
5917 tv=vMap.findW(v);
5918 if (cz) {
5919 target_p.setCenter(tv,source_p.getCenter(v));
5920 count++;
5921 }
5922 if (cr) {
5923 target_p.setRadius(tv,source_p.getRadius(v));
5924 count++;
5925 }
5926 if (cm) {
5927 target_p.setVertMark(tv,source_p.getVertMark(v));
5928 count++;
5929 }
5930 if (cc) {
5931 target_p.setCircleColor(tv,source_p.getCircleColor(v));
5932 count++;
5933 }
5934 if (ca) {
5935 target_p.setAim(tv,source_p.getAim(v));
5936 count++;
5937 }
5938 } // end of while through vlist
5939 break;
5940 }
5941 default:
5942 {
5943 flashError("'get/put_data': unrecognized flag");
5944 return count;
5945 }
5946 } // end of switch
5947 } // end of while through flags
5948 return count;
5949 }
5950
5956 public int scale_aims(double x, NodeLink vlist) {
5957 int count = 0, v;
5958 UtilPacket uP = new UtilPacket();
5959
5960 if (!status || vlist == null || x < 0.0)
5961 return 0;
5962 Iterator<Integer> vtrace = vlist.iterator();
5963
5964 while (vtrace.hasNext()) {
5965 v = (Integer) vtrace.next();
5966 Vertex vert = packDCEL.vertices[v];
5967 if (getAim(v) > 0) {
5968 double angsum;
5969 double rad = packDCEL.getVertRadius(vert.halfedge);
5970 // TODO: use DCEL calls if hes!=0
5971 if (hes < 0) {
5972 h_anglesum_overlap(v, rad, uP);
5973 angsum = uP.value;
5974 } else if (hes > 0) {
5975 s_anglesum(v, rad, uP);
5976 angsum = uP.value;
5977 } else {
5978 angsum = packDCEL.getVertAngSum(vert, rad);
5979 }
5980 setCurv(v, angsum);
5981 setAim(v, getCurv(v) - x * (getCurv(v) - getAim(v)));
5982 count++;
5983 }
5984 } // end of while
5985 return count;
5986 }
5987
5994 public int scale_rad(PackData q,double x,NodeLink vertlist) {
5995 int v,count=0;
5996 double rp,rq;
5997
5998 if (!status || !q.status || vertlist==null || vertlist.size()==0 || x < 0.0) return 0;
5999 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
6000 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
6001 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
6002 rp=getRadius(v);
6003 rq=q.getRadius(v);
6004 if (hes<0) {
6005 if (rp<0) rp=1-Math.exp(-2.0*10.0);
6006 if (rq<0) rq=1-Math.exp(-2.0*10.0);
6007 }
6008 setRadius(v,rp+x*(rq-rp));
6009 count++;
6010 }
6011 return count;
6012 }
6013
6031 public int hexCell(int v,int w,int n,NodeLink vertChain) {
6032 HalfEdge he=packDCEL.findHalfEdge(new EdgeSimple(v,w));
6033 if (he==null)
6034 return 0;
6035 vertChain.add(v);
6036 int count=2;
6037 int edgecount=0;
6038 while (edgecount<6) {
6039 // move along edge
6040 int step=1;
6041 while (step<n) {
6042 HalfEdge nxhe=he.HHleft();
6043 if (nxhe==null) // hit bdry or small degree
6044 return -count;
6045 he=nxhe;
6046 vertChain.add(he.origin.vertIndx);
6047 step++;
6048 count++;
6049 } // end of while
6050
6051 // turn shallow left
6052 HalfEdge spoke=he.twin;
6053 int tick=2;
6054 do {
6055 tick--;
6056 // reached a bdry edge?
6057 if (spoke.twin.face!=null && spoke.twin.face.faceIndx<0) {
6058 if (tick==0)
6059 he= spoke;
6060 else
6061 he=null;
6062 }
6063 else {
6064 spoke=spoke.twin.next; // rotate clw
6065 }
6066 tick--;
6067 } while (he!=null && tick>0);
6068 if (tick==0 && he!=null) { // yes, made the turn
6069 he=spoke;
6070 vertChain.add(he.origin.vertIndx);
6071 count++;
6072 }
6073 else
6074 return -count;
6075 edgecount++;
6076 } // done with 6 edges
6077 if (edgecount<5) // shouldn't happen
6078 return -count;
6079 return count;
6080 }
6081
6090 public int face_map_action(PackData q,int face,boolean trans_flag) {
6091 int nface=0;
6092
6093 if (face<1 || face>faceCount) return 0;
6094 // translate
6095 try {
6096 if (nodeCount==q.nodeCount || vertexMap==null || !trans_flag)
6097 nface=Translators.face_trans(this,q,face,null);
6098 else nface=Translators.face_trans(this,q,face,this.vertexMap);
6099 } catch (Exception ex) {
6100 return 0;
6101 }
6102 if (nface!=0) {
6103 // draw for this packing
6104 int[] verts=packDCEL.faces[face].getVerts();
6105 Complex c0=getCenter(verts[0]);
6106 Complex c1=getCenter(verts[1]);
6107 Complex c2=getCenter(verts[2]);
6108 DispFlags dflags=new DispFlags("f");
6109 dflags.setColor(getFaceColor(face));
6110 cpDrawing.drawFace(c0,c1,c2,null,null,null,dflags);
6111 // draw other packing
6112 verts=q.packDCEL.faces[nface].getVerts();
6113 c0=q.getCenter(verts[0]);
6114 c1=q.getCenter(verts[1]);
6115 c2=q.getCenter(verts[2]);
6116 dflags.setColor(q.getFaceColor(nface));
6117 q.cpDrawing.drawFace(c0,c1,c2,null,null,null,dflags);
6118 }
6119 return 1;
6120 }
6121
6132 public int circle_map_action(PackData q,int v,boolean trans_flag) {
6133 if (v<1 || v>nodeCount) return 0;
6134 // translate
6135 NodeLink nL=null;
6136 try {
6137 if (nodeCount==q.nodeCount || vertexMap==null || !trans_flag)
6138 nL=Translators.vert_translate(null,v,true);
6139 else
6140 nL=Translators.vert_translate(this.vertexMap,v,true);
6141 } catch (Exception ex) {
6142 return 0;
6143 }
6144
6145 boolean donep=false;
6146 DispFlags dispFlags=new DispFlags("f",cpDrawing.fillOpacity);
6147 if (nL!=null && nL.size()>0) {
6148 int count=0;
6149 Iterator<Integer> nli=nL.iterator();
6150 while (nli.hasNext()) {
6151 int nv=(Integer)nli.next();
6152 if (nv>0 && nv<=q.nodeCount) {
6153 if (!donep) { // draw once for this packing
6154 dispFlags.setColor(getCircleColor(v));
6155 cpDrawing.drawCircle(getCenter(v),getRadius(v),dispFlags);
6156 }
6157 donep=true;
6158 }
6159 if (nv<=q.nodeCount) { // draw all the translates
6160 dispFlags.setColor(q.getCircleColor(nv));
6161 q.cpDrawing.drawCircle(q.getCenter(nv),q.getRadius(nv),dispFlags);
6162 count++;
6163 }
6164 }
6165 return count;
6166 }
6167 return 0;
6168 }
6169
6176 public PackExtender findXbyName(String xType) {
6177 Iterator<PackExtender> pXs=packExtensions.iterator();
6178 while (pXs.hasNext()) {
6179 PackExtender pext=pXs.next();
6180 if (pext.getType().equals(xType))
6181 return pext;
6182 }
6183 return null;
6184 }
6185
6193 public PackExtender findXbyAbbrev(String xAbbrev) {
6194
6195 // empty abbreviation
6196 if (xAbbrev.length()==0) {
6197 if(packExtensions.size()==1)
6198 return packExtensions.get(0);
6199 else
6200 return null;
6201 }
6202
6203 Iterator<PackExtender> pXs=packExtensions.iterator();
6204 while (pXs.hasNext()) {
6205 PackExtender pext=pXs.next();
6206 if (pext.getAbbrev().equalsIgnoreCase(xAbbrev))
6207 return pext;
6208 }
6209 return null;
6210 }
6211
6218 public int sa_draw_bdry_seg_num(int n) {
6219 RedEdge rtrace=null;
6220 SideData epair=null;
6221 if (packDCEL.pairLink==null || n<0 || n>=packDCEL.pairLink.size()
6222 || (epair=packDCEL.pairLink.get(n))==null
6223 || (rtrace=epair.startEdge)==null)
6224 return 0;
6225 Complex ctr=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6226 if (hes>0)
6227 ctr=cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(ctr);
6228 cpDrawing.drawIndex(ctr,n,1);
6229 return 1;
6230 }
6231
6240 public int post_bdry_seg_num(PostFactory pF,int n) {
6241 RedEdge trace=null;
6242 SideData epair=null;
6243 if (packDCEL.pairLink==null || n<0 || n>=packDCEL.pairLink.size()
6244 || (epair=packDCEL.pairLink.get(n))==null
6245 || (trace=epair.startEdge)==null)
6246 return 0;
6247 Complex ctr=trace.getCenter();
6248 if (hes>0) {
6249 ctr=cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(ctr);
6250 if (Math.cos(ctr.x)>=0)
6251 pF.postIndex(ctr,n);
6252 }
6253 else
6254 pF.postIndex(ctr,n);
6255 return 1;
6256 }
6257
6267 public int sa_draw_bdry_seg(int n,boolean do_label,boolean do_circle,
6268 Color ecol,int thickness) {
6269 SideData epair=null;
6270
6271 if (packDCEL.pairLink==null || n<0 || n>=packDCEL.pairLink.size()
6272 || (epair=packDCEL.pairLink.get(n))==null
6273 || epair.startEdge==null)
6274 // epair.startEdge.hashCode();epair.startEdge.nextRed.hashCode();
6275 return 0;
6276 RedEdge rtrace=epair.startEdge;
6277 int old_thickness=cpDrawing.getLineThickness();
6278
6279 DispFlags dflags=new DispFlags("");
6280 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(thickness);
6281
6282 Complex w_cent=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6283 do {
6284 Complex v_cent=w_cent;
6285 double v_rad=packDCEL.getVertRadius(rtrace.myEdge);
6286 rtrace=rtrace.nextRed;
6287 w_cent=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6288 if (do_circle) { // do v circle
6289 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(old_thickness);
6290 cpDrawing.drawCircle(v_cent,v_rad,dflags);
6291 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(thickness);
6292 }
6293 DispFlags df=new DispFlags(null);
6294 df.setColor(ecol);
6295 cpDrawing.drawEdge(v_cent,w_cent,df);
6296 } while (rtrace!=epair.endEdge.nextRed);
6297
6298 // last circle?
6299 if (do_circle) {
6300 w_cent=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6301 double w_rad=packDCEL.getVertRadius(rtrace.myEdge);
6302 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(old_thickness);
6303 cpDrawing.drawCircle(w_cent,w_rad,dflags);
6304 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(thickness);
6305 }
6306
6307 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(old_thickness);
6308 if (do_label)
6309 sa_draw_bdry_seg_num(n);
6310 return 1;
6311 }
6312
6324 public int post_bdry_seg(PostFactory pF,int n,boolean do_label,
6325 boolean do_circle,Color ecol,double tx) {
6326 SideData epair=null;
6327
6328 if (packDCEL.pairLink==null || n<0 || n>=packDCEL.pairLink.size()
6329 || (epair=packDCEL.pairLink.get(n))==null
6330 || epair.startEdge==null)
6331 // epair.startEdge.hashCode();epair.startEdge.nextRed.hashCode();
6332 return 0;
6333 RedEdge rtrace=epair.startEdge;
6334 int old_thickness=cpDrawing.getLineThickness();
6335
6336 Complex w_cent=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6337 do {
6338 Complex v_cent=w_cent;
6339 rtrace=rtrace.nextRed;
6340 w_cent=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6341 if (hes>0) {
6342 v_cent=cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(v_cent);
6343 w_cent=cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(w_cent);
6344 }
6345 if (do_circle) { // do v circle
6346 double v_rad=packDCEL.getVertRadius(rtrace.myEdge);
6347 pF.postCircle(hes,v_cent,v_rad);
6348 }
6349 pF.postColorEdge(hes,v_cent,w_cent,ecol,tx);
6350 } while (rtrace!=epair.endEdge.nextRed);
6351
6352 // last circle?
6353 if (do_circle) {
6354 w_cent=packDCEL.getVertCenter(rtrace.myEdge);
6355 w_cent=cpDrawing.sphView.toApparentSph(w_cent);
6356 double w_rad=packDCEL.getVertRadius(rtrace.myEdge);
6357 pF.postCircle(hes,w_cent,w_rad);
6358 }
6359
6360 cpDrawing.setLineThickness(old_thickness);
6361 if (do_label)
6362 post_bdry_seg_num(pF,n);
6363 return 1;
6364 }
6365
6366 public int output_parse(BufferedWriter fp,String prefix,String data,String loop,
6367 String suffix,Mobius mob) {
6368 try {
6369 fp.write(prefix);
6370 flashError("error writing 'prefix'");
6371 fp.flush();
6372 fp.close();
6373 return 1;
6374 } catch (Exception ex) {
6375 return 0;
6376 }
6377 }
6378
6394 public int match(PackData qackData, int v1, int v2, int w1, int w2,
6395 Mobius mob) {
6396 Complex a1, a2, b1, b2, Two;
6397
6398 mob.error = 0.0;
6399 if (!status || !qackData.status || hes > 0 || hes != qackData.hes)
6400 return 0;
6401 if (hes < 0) { // hyperbolic automorphism
6402 a1 = getCenter(v1);
6403 a2 = getCenter(v2);
6404 b1 = qackData.getCenter(w1);
6405 b2 = qackData.getCenter(w2);
6406 if (a1.abs() >= Mobius.MOD1 && a2.abs() >= Mobius.MOD1
6407 && b1.abs() >= Mobius.MOD1 && b2.abs() >= Mobius.MOD1)
6408 /*
6409 * all on unit circle: fixup: need one more real parameter, and I
6410 * don't know where to get it; I'll put 2.0, 2.0 in for now so we at
6411 * least get a result.
6412 */
6413 {
6414 Two = new Complex(2.0);
6415 mob = Mobius.trans_abAB(a1, a2, b1, b2, Two, Two);
6416 } else if (a1.abs() < Mobius.MOD1 && a2.abs() < Mobius.MOD1
6417 && b1.abs() < Mobius.MOD1 && b2.abs() < Mobius.MOD1) {
6418 // all interior
6419 mob = Mobius.auto_abAB(a1, a2, b1, b2);
6420 } else {
6421 flashError("match: data not suitable");
6422 return 0;
6423 }
6424 return 1; // can check error in 'mob'
6425 }
6426
6427 // else: eucl automorphism
6428 a1 = getCenter(v1);
6429 a2 = getCenter(v2);
6430 b1 = qackData.getCenter(w1);
6431 b2 = qackData.getCenter(w2);
6432 mob = Mobius.mob_abAB(a1, a2, b1, b2);
6433 return 1;
6434 }
6435
6444 public int comb_bdry_antip(int []ans) {
6445 int v=ans[0];
6446 if (v<1 || v>nodeCount || !isBdry(v)) {
6447 // improper vert? use first bdry vert encountered
6448 int vv=0;
6449 for (int i=1;i<=nodeCount;i++)
6450 if (isBdry(i)) {
6451 vv=i;
6452 i=nodeCount+1;
6453 }
6454 if (vv==0)
6455 return 0; // no boundary
6456 v=vv;
6457 }
6458 int n;
6459 if ((n=bdry_comp_count(v))==0 || n<4 )
6460 return 0;
6461 n=(int)(n/2);
6462 int w=v;
6463 for (int i=1;i<=n;i++)
6464 w=getFirstPetal(v);
6465 ans[0]=v;
6466 ans[1]=w;
6467 return n;
6468 }
6469
6492 public int blend(PackData q,int bdry_vert,int depth) {
6493 double factor,ofactor=1.0;
6494
6495 if (!status || !q.status || q.vertexMap==null) return 0;
6496
6497 // find bdry verts to match for registering packings
6498 int []ans=new int[2];
6499 ans[0]=bdry_vert;
6500 int n=q.comb_bdry_antip(ans);
6501 int v=ans[0]; // if bdry_vert was not adequate, it becomes v in this call
6502 int w=ans[1];
6503 int V,W;
6504 try {
6505 V=Translators.vert_translate(q.vertexMap,v,true).get(0);
6506 W=Translators.vert_translate(q.vertexMap,w,true).get(0);
6507 } catch (Exception ex) {
6508 return 0;
6509 }
6510 if (n==0 || V<=0 || W<=0) return 0;
6511
6512 // find and apply Mobius to get q in register with p.
6513 NodeLink bdrylist=new NodeLink(this,"b");
6514 Mobius M=new Mobius();
6515 if (q.match(this,v,w,V,W,M)!=0 || M.error>TOLER || bdrylist==null
6516 || bdrylist.size()==0)
6517 return 0;
6518 NodeLink vertlist=new NodeLink(this,"a");
6519 if (hes==0) { // eucl case: should be affine map
6520 factor=M.a.abs();
6521 for (int i=1;i<=q.nodeCount;i++) {
6522 q.setRadius(i,getRadius(i)*factor);
6523 q.setCenter(i,q.getCenter(i).times(M.a).add(M.b));
6524 }
6525 }
6526 else q.apply_Mobius(M,vertlist);
6527
6528 // get list with generation labels
6529 for (int i=1;i<=q.nodeCount;i++) q.setVertUtil(i,0);
6530 Iterator<Integer> blist=bdrylist.iterator();
6531 while (blist.hasNext()) {
6532 v=(Integer)blist.next();
6533 q.setVertUtil(v,1);
6534 }
6535 UtilPacket uP=new UtilPacket();
6536 int []genlist=q.packDCEL.label_generations(depth,uP);
6537 if (genlist==null)
6538 return 0;
6539
6540 // for efficiency, put vertex_map in vector.
6541 int []maplist=new int[q.nodeCount+1];
6542 Iterator<EdgeSimple> vm=q.vertexMap.iterator();
6543 EdgeSimple edge=null;
6544 while (vm.hasNext()) {
6545 edge=(EdgeSimple)vm.next();
6546 maplist[edge.v]=edge.w;
6547 }
6548
6549 // what is actual number of generations overlap? (up to 'depth').
6550 int max_depth=q.nodeCount;
6551 for (int i=1;i<=q.nodeCount;i++) {
6552 q.setVertMark(i,0);
6553 if (genlist[i]>0 && genlist[i]<=max_depth && maplist[i]==0)
6554 // vert of q in this generation does have corresp. vert in p
6555 max_depth=genlist[i]-1;
6556 else q.setVertMark(i,genlist[i]); // record gen in mark in case it's needed
6557 }
6558 // bdry doesn't overlap?
6559 if (max_depth<1) return 0;
6560 if (depth<0) depth=max_depth;
6561 if (max_depth<depth) depth=max_depth;
6562
6563 /* now set centers of p circles in overlap by going successively
6564 through generations in q and weighting their centers with
6565 centers already in p. */
6566
6567 int tv;
6568 for (int i=1;i<=depth;i++) {
6569 vertlist=new NodeLink(q,"{m.eq."+i+"}");
6570 // should have verts in every generation up to depth
6571 if (vertlist.size()==0)
6572 return 0;
6573 factor=0.0;
6574 if (depth>1) factor=(double)(i-1)/(double)(depth-1);
6575 ofactor=1.0-factor;
6576 Iterator<Integer> vlist=vertlist.iterator();
6577 while (vlist.hasNext()) {
6578 v=(Integer)vlist.next();
6579 if ((tv=maplist[v])==0 || tv>nodeCount)
6580 return 0; // failed translation
6581 Complex zt=getCenter(tv);
6582 Complex zz=q.getCenter(v);
6583 setCenter(tv,zt.times(ofactor).
6584 add(zz.times(factor)));
6585
6586 setRadius(tv,ofactor*getRadius(tv)+
6587 factor*q.getRadius(v));
6588 }
6589 }
6590
6591 /* finally, for all the rest of the vertices of q, map their
6592 centers/radii over to p without change */
6593 for (int i=1;i<=q.nodeCount;i++) {
6594 if ((q.getVertMark(i)>depth || q.getVertMark(i)==0)
6595 && (tv=maplist[i])!=0 && tv<=nodeCount) {
6596 setCenter(tv,q.getCenter(i));
6597 setRadius(tv,q.getRadius(i));
6598 }
6599 }
6600 return 1;
6601 }
6602
6616 public int adjacency(BufferedWriter fp,boolean tm) {
6617 int start,nv,nodes;
6618
6619 if ((nodes=nodeCount)>10000) {
6620 flashError("usage: adjacency: packing is too large, over 10000");
6621 return 0;
6622 }
6623 try {
6624 if (tm) {
6625 fp.write("%% transition matrix for the simple random "+
6626 "walk on a circle packing graph; "+nodes+" vertices.\n\n"+
6627 "echo on\n"+
6628 "T=zeros("+nodes+","+nodes+");\n");
6629 for (int j=1;j<=nodes;j++) {
6630 if (isBdry(j))
6631 fp.write("T("+j+","+j+")=1;\n"); // absorbing bdry vertices
6632 else {
6633 for (int i=1;i<=nodes;i++)
6634 if (nghb(i,j)>=0)
6635 fp.write("T("+i+","+j+")=1/"+countFaces(j)+";\n");
6636 }
6637 }
6638 if (getBdryCompCount()!=0) { // nonempty boundary?
6639 fp.write("Bdry=[");
6640 for (int i=1;i<=getBdryCompCount();i++) {
6641 start=bdryStarts[i];
6642 fp.write(new String(start+" "));
6643 nv=start;
6644 while ((nv=getFirstPetal(nv))!=start) {
6645 fp.write(new String(nv+" "));
6646 }
6647 }
6648 fp.write("];\n\n");
6649 fp.write("pause %% press any key to get exit distribution "+
6650 "function of exit probabilities.\n");
6651 fp.write("dist=zeros("+nodes+");dist("+
6652 packDCEL.alpha.origin.vertIndx+")=1\n");
6653 fp.write("equib=T^10000*dist\n");
6654 fp.write("Acum(1)=equib(Bdry(1));\n");
6655 fp.write("for i=2:size(Bdry,2),\n");
6656 fp.write("Acum(i)=Acum(i-1)+equib(Bdry(i));\n");
6657 fp.write("end\nAcum\n");
6658 }
6659 }
6660 else {
6661 fp.write("% adjacency matrix for a circle packing graph; "+
6662 nodes+" vertices\n\n"+"A=zeros("+nodes+","+nodes+");\n");
6663 for (int i=1;i<=nodes;i++)
6664 for (int j=1;j<=nodes;j++)
6665 if (nghb(i,j)>=0)
6666 fp.write("A("+i+","+j+")=1;\n");
6667 }
6668 fp.write("% end\n");
6669 fp.flush();
6670 fp.close();
6671 } catch (Exception ex) {
6672 try {
6673 fp.flush();
6674 fp.close();
6675 } catch (Exception exx) {}
6676 flashError("adjacency: exception in writing the file.");
6677 return 0;
6678 }
6679 return 1;
6680 }
6681
6688 public int adjust_rad(int v,double factor) {
6689 if (factor==1.0)
6690 return 1;
6691 if (v<1 || v>nodeCount || factor<=0.0)
6692 return 0;
6693 double newrad;
6694 int count=0;
6695 double rad=getRadius(v);
6696 if (hes<0) { // hyperbolic
6697 if (rad<0) { // infinite radius?
6698 if (factor>0.99999)
6699 newrad=rad; // don't change
6700 else // becomes large but finite
6701 newrad=.9995;
6702 count++;
6703 }
6704 else if (rad>.99999 && factor>1.0) {
6705 setRadiusActual(v,5.0); // essentially infinite
6706 count++;
6707 return count;
6708 }
6709 else { // replace x by x=1-exp(factor*(log(1-x)))
6710 newrad=1.0-Math.exp(factor*Math.log(1.0-rad));
6711 count++;
6712 }
6713 }
6714 else if (hes>0) { // spherical
6715 newrad=rad*factor;
6716 if (newrad<=0 || newrad>=Math.PI)
6717 newrad=rad; // illegal, don't change
6718 else
6719 count++;
6720 }
6721 else { // eucl
6722 newrad=rad*factor;
6723 count++;
6724 }
6725 if (count>0)
6726 setRadius(v,newrad);
6727 return count;
6728 }
6729
6730 public int adjust_uzian(HalfEdge edge,double factor) {
6731 if (factor==1.0)
6732 return 1;
6733 if (factor<=0.0)
6734 return 0;
6735 double newsch;
6736 int count=0;
6737 double uzian=1.0-getSchwarzian(edge);
6738 newsch=1-uzian*factor;
6739 count++;
6740 if (count>0)
6741 this.setSchwarzian(edge, newsch);
6742 return count;
6743 }
6744
6753 public int makeGrid(Complex cent,double rad,int lineCount) {
6754 PackData localPD=this;
6755 if (this.hes>0) {
6756 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("grids not yet available for spherical packings");
6757 return 0;
6758 }
6759 if (this.hes<0) {
6760 localPD=this.copyPackTo();
6761 localPD.geom_to_e();
6762 }
6763 CPBase.gridLines=new Vector<BaryCoordLink>(2*lineCount);
6764 for (int j=1;j<=lineCount;j++) {
6765 Path2D.Double ray=new Path2D.Double();
6766 ray.moveTo(cent.x,cent.y);
6767 double ang=(double)j*Math.PI*2.0/lineCount;
6768 ray.lineTo(Math.cos(ang),Math.sin(ang));
6769 CPBase.gridLines.addAll(PathBaryUtil.fromPath(localPD,ray));
6770 CPBase.gridLines.addAll(PathBaryUtil.fromPath(localPD,
6771 PathUtil.getCirclePath((double)j/(lineCount+1),
6772 new Complex(0.0),128)));
6773 }
6774 return 1;
6775 }
6776
6784 public int makeGrid(Complex lowl,Complex upr,int lineCount) {
6785 PackData localPD=this;
6786 if (this.hes>0) {
6787 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("grids not yet available for spherical packings");
6788 return 0;
6789 }
6790 if (this.hes<0) {
6791 localPD=this.copyPackTo();
6792 localPD.geom_to_e();
6793 }
6794 CPBase.gridLines=new Vector<BaryCoordLink>(2*lineCount+2);
6795 for (int j=0;j<=lineCount;j++) {
6796 double high=upr.y-lowl.y;
6797 double wide=upr.x-lowl.x;
6798 if (high<=0) high=1;
6799 if (wide<=0) wide=1;
6800 high /=lineCount;
6801 wide /=lineCount;
6802 // vertical line
6803 double spot=lowl.x+(double)j*wide;
6804 Path2D.Double ray=new Path2D.Double();
6805 ray.moveTo(spot,lowl.y);
6806 ray.lineTo(spot,upr.y);
6807 CPBase.gridLines.addAll(PathBaryUtil.fromPath(localPD,ray));
6808 // horizontal line
6809 spot=lowl.y+(double)j*high;
6810 ray=new Path2D.Double();
6811 ray.moveTo(lowl.x,spot);
6812 ray.lineTo(upr.x,spot);
6813 CPBase.gridLines.addAll(PathBaryUtil.fromPath(localPD,ray));
6814 }
6815 return lineCount;
6816 }
6817
6826 public GraphLink getAsGraph(NodeLink exclude) {
6827 GraphLink ans=new GraphLink();
6828 int k=0;
6829 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
6830 if (exclude!=null && exclude.containsV(v)<0) {
6831 int[] flower=packDCEL.vertices[v].getFlower(true);
6832 for (int j=0;j<flower.length;j++) {
6833 if ((k=flower[j])>v &&
6834 exclude!=null && exclude.containsV(k)<0)
6835 ans.add(new EdgeSimple(v,k));
6836 }
6837 }
6838 }
6839 return ans;
6840 }
6841
6846 public Triangulation getTriangulation() {
6847 Triangulation Tri=new Triangulation();
6848 Tri.faceCount=faceCount;
6849 Tri.nodeCount=nodeCount;
6850 Tri.maxIndex=Tri.nodeCount;
6851 Tri.faces=new Face[Tri.faceCount+1];
6852 Tri.nodes=new Point3D[Tri.nodeCount+1];
6853
6854 // build triangles
6855 for (int f=1;f<=Tri.faceCount;f++) {
6856 combinatorics.komplex.DcelFace face=packDCEL.faces[f];
6857 int[] vert=face.getVerts();
6858 Tri.faces[f]=new combinatorics.komplex.Face(vert.length);
6859 Tri.faces[f].vert=vert;
6860 }
6861
6862 // store locations
6863 for (int v=1;v<=nodeCount;v++) {
6864 Complex z=getCenter(v);
6865 Tri.nodes[v]=new Point3D(z.x,z.y,0.0);
6866 }
6867
6868 return Tri;
6869 }
6870
6886 public static NodeLink resample(PackData p,Path2D.Double Gamma,
6887 int mode,double thinning) {
6888
6889 // prepare return route
6890 NodeLink theChosen=null;
6891 Random rand=new Random(); // could add 'seed' for debugging.
6892
6893 // only case for now
6894 if (mode==1 && Gamma!=null) {
6895
6896 // store normalized distances to the boundary
6897 double []val=new double[p.nodeCount+1];
6898 double maxdepth=-100000;
6899 for (int v=1;v<=p.nodeCount;v++) {
6900 val[v]=EuclMath.dist_to_path(p.getCenter(v),PathUtil.gpPolygon(Gamma).get(0));
6901 maxdepth=(val[v]>maxdepth) ? val[v] : maxdepth;
6902 }
6903 if (maxdepth<=.000000001) {
6904 throw new DataException("spread of depths appears to be off");
6905 }
6906
6907 // TODO: here we need a function describing how to set the
6908 // probability based on 'val'.
6909 double a=.25;
6910 double b=.9;
6911 double prob;
6912 theChosen=new NodeLink(p);
6913 for (int v=1;v<=p.nodeCount;v++) {
6914 val[v] /= maxdepth; // seems reasonable (??) to normalize to [-1,1] to
6915 // prepare for more general situations.
6916
6917 prob=1.0;
6918 if (val[v]<a)
6919 prob=1.0;
6920 else if (val[v]>b)
6921 prob=thinning;
6922 else { // interpolate
6923 prob=1.0+(val[v]-a)*(thinning-1.0)/(b-a);
6924 }
6925 if (rand.nextDouble()<=prob) {
6926 theChosen.add(v);
6927 }
6928 }
6929 return theChosen;
6930 }
6931
6932 // for future alternate schemes
6933 else {
6934 throw new ParserException("so far, only mode=1 is set up");
6935 }
6936 }
6937
6956 public static PackData sampledSubPack(PackData p,NodeLink chosen) {
6957 if (p.hes>0) {
6958 CirclePack.cpb.errMsg("'sampledSubPack' cannot be called "
6959 + "for spherical packings");
6960 return null;
6961 }
6962
6963 // get full list, chosen plus bdry
6964 int[] vhits=new int[p.nodeCount+1];
6965 Iterator<Integer> vlst=chosen.iterator();
6966 while (vlst.hasNext())
6967 vhits[vlst.next()]=1;
6968 NodeLink bdry=new NodeLink(p,"b");
6969 Iterator<Integer> bis=bdry.iterator();
6970 while (bis.hasNext())
6971 vhits[bis.next()]=1;
6972
6973 NodeLink thechosen=new NodeLink(p);
6974 for (int v=1;v<=p.nodeCount;v++)
6975 if (vhits[v]!=0)
6976 thechosen.add(v);
6977
6978 // create DelaunayData
6979 DelaunayData dData=new DelaunayData();
6980 dData.geometry=0; // treat as euclidean
6981 dData.pointCount=thechosen.size();
6982 dData.ptX=new double[dData.pointCount+1];
6983 dData.ptY=new double[dData.pointCount+1];
6984
6985 // must associate old/new indices
6986 VertexMap vmap=new VertexMap();
6987
6988 vlst=thechosen.iterator();
6989 int v;
6990 int hit=1; // previous code suggests numbering from 1
6991 while (vlst.hasNext()) {
6992 v=vlst.next();
6993 Complex pz=p.getCenter(v);
6994 dData.ptX[hit]=pz.x;
6995 dData.ptY[hit]=pz.y;
6996 vmap.add(new EdgeSimple(v,hit)); // {original,new}
6997 hit++;
6998 }
6999
7000 // get edge information
7001 EdgeLink bdrylist=new EdgeLink(p,"b");
7002 dData.edgeV=null;
7003 dData.edgeW=null;
7004 if (bdrylist!=null) {
7005 dData.bdryCount=bdrylist.size();
7006 dData.edgeV=new int[dData.bdryCount];
7007 dData.edgeW=new int[dData.bdryCount];
7008 Iterator<EdgeSimple> eit=bdrylist.iterator();
7009 int hits=0;
7010 while (eit.hasNext()) {
7011 EdgeSimple edge=(EdgeSimple)eit.next();
7012 dData.edgeV[hits]=vmap.findW(edge.v);
7013 dData.edgeW[hits]=vmap.findW(edge.w);
7014 hits++;
7015 }
7016 }
7017
7018 ProcessDelaunay.planeDelaunay(dData);
7019 Triangulation Tri = dData.getTriangulation();
7020 PackData samplePack=Triangulation.tri_to_Complex(Tri,dData.geometry);
7021 samplePack.fileName=new String("resampled"+dData.pointCount);
7022 return samplePack;
7023 }
7024
7025 public void setSidePairs(PairLink plink) {
7026 packDCEL.pairLink=plink;
7027 }
7028
7029 public PairLink getSidePairs() {
7030 return packDCEL.pairLink;
7031 }
7032
7037 public NodeLink getPairIndices() {
7038 NodeLink indices=new NodeLink();
7039 if (packDCEL.pairLink!=null || packDCEL.pairLink.countPairs()==0)
7040 return null;
7041 for (int j=1;j<packDCEL.pairLink.size();j++) {
7042 SideData sidd=packDCEL.pairLink.get(j);
7043 if (sidd.mateIndex>sidd.spIndex)
7044 indices.add(sidd.spIndex);
7045 }
7046 return indices;
7047 }

7054 public Mobius getSideMob(int e) {
7055 try {
7056 return packDCEL.pairLink.get(e).mob;
7057 } catch(Exception ex) {
7058 throw new CombException("failed to get side pair "+e);
7059 }
7060 }

7066 public boolean haveInvDistances() {
7067 boolean ivdflag=false;
7068 for (int v=1;(v<=this.nodeCount && !ivdflag);v++) {
7069 HalfLink spokes=packDCEL.vertices[v].getSpokes(null);
7070 Iterator<HalfEdge> sis=spokes.iterator();
7071 while(sis.hasNext() ) {
7072 HalfEdge he=sis.next();
7073 if (he.getInvDist()!=1.0)
7074 ivdflag=true;
7075 }
7076 }
7077 return ivdflag;
7078 }
7079
7087 public static int getIntrinsicGeom(PackData p) {
7088 int iG=-1;
7089 if (p.getBdryCompCount()==0) {
7090 if (p.genus==0) // sphere
7091 iG=1;
7092 else if (p.genus==1) // torus
7093 iG=0;
7094 }
7095 else if (p.genus==0) //
7096 iG=0;
7097 return iG;
7098 }
7099
7115 public static Mobius holonomyMobius(PackData p,HalfLink hlink) {
7116
7117 PackDCEL pdcel=p.packDCEL;
7118 HalfEdge startedge=hlink.getFirst();
7119 HalfEdge endedge=hlink.getLast();
7120
7121 Iterator<HalfEdge> his=hlink.iterator();
7122
7123 // locate the first face
7124 HalfEdge currhe=his.next();
7125 HalfEdge nexthe=currhe;
7126 CircleSimple cs0=pdcel.getVertData(currhe);
7127 CircleSimple cs1=pdcel.getVertData(currhe.next);
7128 double rad=pdcel.getVertRadius(currhe.next.next);
7129 CircleSimple cs2=CommonMath.comp_any_center(cs0,cs1,rad,
7130 currhe.next.getSchwarzian(),
7131 currhe.next.next.getSchwarzian(),
7132 currhe.getSchwarzian(),p.hes);
7133 Complex[] startZ=new Complex[3];
7134 startZ[0]=new Complex(cs0.center);
7135 startZ[1]=new Complex(cs1.center);
7136 startZ[2]=new Complex(cs2.center);
7137 while (his.hasNext()) {
7138 currhe=nexthe;
7139 nexthe=his.next();
7140
7141 if (nexthe.twin.prev==currhe) // head-to-head?
7142 cs0=cs2;
7143 else // tail-to-tail
7144 cs1=cs2;
7145
7146 rad=pdcel.getVertRadius(nexthe.next.next);
7147 cs2=CommonMath.comp_any_center(cs0,cs1,rad,
7148 nexthe.next.getSchwarzian(),
7149 nexthe.next.next.getSchwarzian(),
7150 nexthe.getSchwarzian(),p.hes);
7151 }
7152
7153 // line up triples
7154 Complex[] endZ=new Complex[3];
7155 if (endedge.next==startedge) { // head-to-tail
7156 endZ[0]=cs1.center;
7157 endZ[1]=cs2.center;
7158 endZ[2]=cs0.center;
7159 }
7160 else { // tail-to-head
7161 endZ[0]=cs2.center;
7162 endZ[1]=cs0.center;
7163 endZ[2]=cs1.center;
7164 }
7165
7166// String opts=null;
7167// if (draw) opts=new String("-ff"); // draw the colored faces as we go
7168// DispFlags dflags=new DispFlags(opts,p.cpDrawing.fillOpacity);
7169 Mobius mob=new Mobius(); // initialize transformation
7170 if (p.hes<0) // hyp
7171 mob=Mobius.auto_abAB(startZ[0],startZ[1],endZ[0],endZ[1]);
7172 else if (p.hes==0) { // eucl
7173 Complex denom=startZ[1].minus(startZ[0]);
7174 if (denom.abs()<.00000001)
7175 return null;
7176 mob.a=endZ[0].minus(endZ[1]).divide(denom);
7177 mob.b=endZ[0].minus(mob.a.times(startZ[0]));
7178 }
7179 else { // sph: TODO: this is untested
7180 mob=Mobius.mob_xyzXYZ(startZ[0],startZ[1],startZ[2],
7181 endZ[0],endZ[1],endZ[2],1,1);
7182 }
7183 return mob;
7184 }
7185
7203 public static PackData schFlowerErr(Vertex vert,Complex err,CircleSimple cs) {
7204 if (vert.isBdry())
7205 return null;
7206 ArrayList<Double> schvals=new ArrayList<Double>();
7207 HalfEdge he=vert.halfedge;
7208 schvals.add(he.getSchwarzian());
7209 he=he.prev.twin;
7210 while(he!=vert.halfedge) {
7211 schvals.add(he.getSchwarzian());
7212 he=he.prev.twin;
7213 }
7214 int order=MathUtil.getOrder(vert.aim);
7215 PackData p=PackCreation.seed(schvals,cs,err,order);
7216 return p;
7217 }
7218
7219
7220} // end of 'PackData' class
